These wins are nothing short of historic. Despite the GOP’s outsized spending, record fundraising, and a decades-long advantage at the state legislative ballot level, we were able to elect incredible state Democratic candidates who will fight to protect our rights, our progressive agenda, and our democracy.
But we can’t take _any_ of this for granted – **each of these victories was hard-won and made possible by many months spent organizing volunteers, making key investments, running digital ads, and reaching out to voters – critical work fueled by donations from our grassroots supporters like you.**

body:
We’re begging for your help to hold him accountable
| | **_BREAKING:_**
**MAGA Republicans Launch All-Out Offensive Against the January 6th Committee after the Committee makes 4 Criminal Charge Referrals** | [45,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: SIGN NOW TO STAND WITH THE JAN. 6TH COMMITTEE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/jan-6-trump/?source=VPP_20221221_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=6&akid=5897%2E878179%2EgdSlMG)
---
**_MONDAY:_** The January 6th Committee recapped their findings and recommended criminal charges for Donald Trump’s crimes during their final public hearing.

**_THEN THE NEWS BROKE:_** That the January 6th Committee had launched ethics complaints against Kevin McCarthy and other GOP lawmakers.

**_SO NOW:_** The MAGA GOP is **_fighting like hell_** to ruin the investigation in its final stages and save Donald Trump from full accountability for his role in the Capitol Insurrection.
[**That’s why we’re circulating an URGENT PETITION and calling on 45,000 Democrats to add their names to stand with the Jan. 6th committee. You haven’t signed yet so we’re BEGGING: ADD YOUR NAME NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/jan-6-trump/?source=VPP_20221221_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=5897%2E878179%2EgdSlMG)
[45,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: SIGN NOW TO STAND WITH THE JAN. 6TH COMMITTEE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/jan-6-trump/?source=VPP_20221221_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=5897%2E878179%2EgdSlMG)

Thank you,

VPP
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5897%2E878179%2EgdSlMG). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5897%2E878179%2EgdSlMG).**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Wesley=20Hunt?=
subject: Republicans need to DITCH the Omnibus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Republicans need to DITCH the Omnibus | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ca8dcfcc3099/republicans-need-to-ditch-the-omnibus?e=6b59dbf13a)
---
| |
---
| | Friend,

Last week, I wrote a letter with 14 of my future freshman colleagues urging Leader McConnell and Senate Republicans to oppose the $1.7 Trillion Omnibus spending bill. With 13 days left until Republicans take over the House of Representatives, the last thing we should be doing is making concessions to the radical left and the Biden Administration right before we retake the majority.

Included in the bill is a laundry list of unnecessary spending, including but not limited to:
* $45 billion in Ukraine Aid
* $400 million for border security for Jordan, Oman, and other Middle Eastern countries
* Language that prohibits Customs and Border Protection from increasing our border security
* Billions of dollars in pet projects for Democrats including a multi-million dollar federal building named after Nancy Pelosi

Even more shocking is that last night, 21 Senate Republicans voted to advance the bill in the Senate! This is not what’s in the best interest of our country, which is why I was proud to sign [onto a letter](https://wesleyfortexas.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=724e4968b7cd9603cc2411e9c&id=d8c8fdf87c&e=6b59dbf13a) urging Mitch McConnell and Republicans in the Senate to ditch this bill at once.

---
|
---
| **Read more about our letter to Mitch McConnell through Breitbart News** **[HERE](https://wesleyfortexas.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=724e4968b7cd9603cc2411e9c&id=a61854c96b&e=6b59dbf13a).**
House Republicans should unite together and make sure our colleagues in the Senate hear the voices of the American people. Passing this outrageous piece of legislation in the middle of the night is exactly why Washington D.C. is known as the swamp, and I can't wait until January to ensure our conservative Houston values are heard in Washington.

Sincerely,
Wesley Hunt

clean_body: | | | Peter, In just a few days, we’ll be gathering with our loved ones for Christmas. Police officers across America put their lives on the line every day to protect our streets - and sacrifice time away from their families to do so. This holiday season, we’re so grateful for our brave police officers, and we want to show the world that America backs the blue. | | - | | | | | A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott: Joe Biden’s America includes record high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, and increasing crime. Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. I can’t do it without patriots like you, so Thank you for your support, Senator Rick Scott | | Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida | | Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Friend,

It’s official — we’re going to trial.

_**After you count up all the evidence (a sitting Secretary of State overseeing her own “election,” malfunctioning voting machines, sham ballots, and everything in between) the facts are irrefutable.**_

Now comes the hard part — this fight is going to get tougher, the Establishment and Fake News media will do everything they can to cover up their crooked actions during our election.

We’ve got one of the best armies of lawyers in the entire country, and we’re ready to stay on the front lines of this fight for as long as it takes, **but we can’t do it ourselves.**

**The fact of the matter is — we’re emptying the war chest quicker than we can fill it up.**

subject: Fake News
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc
body:
Stand with Kari Lake
Stand with Kari Lake

| [ ](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJx1kUFPxCAQhX9Ne6OhA2299KCummjiSU08bRCGFi20S6nN-uuFuupFEwLJN4_HYwbbsm7iqhlArlpRC40qNy1QgBIgHowyVlDWvHDOK9FIVmqUGadohRkKUa7C-3G0hRxt3reAL2dUNhQ4bbiWuiqpOKOMlkIiV1WVD20fwjRn7DyD67hmlIvHYjXOo0omiYl3JMKbj9EJoheniHEy8lMoSkKPWryhw3Um43FKtYxd-2Tljesytgt-wQxqux-nYNwvWILdW1RmsZF5fJ974b_5PC5eYuRflhsL6JNynyKdEqVAMQ8RH0Tyk0wKOwnTpYf-CvmtGl1AF_4RbT8hq4_ivRuMirLDk37cTfLhlm-wNyo2bsdvO31VPfPct2pazTCYuW7iRLptImkOMc1g9LHNmosMYLsGsLUcDs-r9curvbsh56ojh_reVqkIl3EPxwl_lCeTYht0os3uExwAsiE)

---
53% of the polling locations didn't work on election day.

Would you go on an airplane where half the engines didn't work?

If the legal system can't land this plane, Arizona is going to go into a tailspin.

Why isn’t the media talking about any of this?

| | | Even though we successfully expanded our Senate majority, things are still precarious right now. With such a razor-thin margin, we cannot take a single vote -- or a single day -- for granted.

Our Senior Leadership Team has been reviewing the political landscape ahead, but we need reliable responses from voters so we don't make a mistake. **That's why we selected a few top Democrats to send our Grassroots Strategy Survey for our expanded Democratic majority's First 100 Days -- and you were selected.**

This is one of the DSCC's most exclusive focus groups, and you should feel proud to be chosen at this pivotal moment in American history. But with time running out before we lock in some of our most critical strategy decisions, it's vital that you share your input immediately.

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: A new conservative movement
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews._S_-4wBMIBHECyzQQ)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win!_ **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://trk.readactnews.-gmv2_ymEEKqxKP0IvA)
---
[ Get my book](http://trk.readactnews._A)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://trk.readactnews.) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://trk.readactnews.-LcU1uE9Epg)
---
[ Get my book](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We're helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
| | [ Get my book ](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEOTurning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Where things stand
body:
With limited time remaining in our year-end fundraising campaign, I wanted to make sure you knew exactly where things stand. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7652%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=r6snX6yi%2b%2fb3Nct%2bMnhzkQ&sysid=1)
ACI - Giving Tuesday 2022 |
---
| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98851%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J9rQvzY9pA1u%2b7CWyv%2bEDQ&sysid=1)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

With limited time remaining in our year-end fundraising campaign, I wanted to make sure you knew exactly where things stand.

I’m truly encouraged that so many patriots have answered the call to help restore America’s guiding principles and are [so willing to work together to create a better path forward for our republic.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98852%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nVny%2fDVgoE7o4SNhrUVMaw&sysid=1)

I am truly grateful that there are so many who are willing to take action and give what they can to help create the American future they want for themselves, their families, and all American children.

**[**But we are still short of our goal --and time is running out.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98853%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ByD3Mg1LqIl%2fYJ7H0kDTRA&sysid=1)**

ACI has developed an ambitious plan to restore and defend the values that matter most to you in the coming year. [But we need your help to fund the initiatives we have planned.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98854%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QeCojOAwBJp9YpcOUkovAw&sysid=1)

**Your gift today will help accomplish great things in 2023:**
* You will help share “Little Patriots,” a free online K-5 curriculum, with parents, grandparents, and educators who want to teach kids about America’s founding principles and timeless values
* You will be part of critical legal battles and policy debates aimed at protecting religious liberty, individual freedom, the rights of the unborn, and other Constitutional principles
* You will sustain and expand successful faith-based outreach and voter registration initiatives that educate the faithful about the importance of exercising their right to vote
* You will help Dr. Carson bring national leaders together for meaningful discussions about the state of our nation and to collaborate on conservative solutions to the challenges facing America

**And when you give whatever your budget allows,[**your investment in our nation’s future will automatically be doubled by our $100,000 matching gift challenge.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98865%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=P2ZwJatDb7%2fhrpktfThCUA&sysid=1)**

Right now, the conservative movement has an incredible opportunity to build on the momentum we have gained over the past year. But if we don’t act now, far-left elements of our society will stop at nothing to undo all we have accomplished.

We can’t let this happen. And I need your help to get our great nation back on track.

[Please join me by making a meaningful gift of whatever your budget allows--no gift is too small.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98866%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=G5EK0H2yDPb4zXycyBOUsQ&sysid=1) And whatever you’re able to give today will have twice the impact, and will do twice the good, as it would at any other time of year!

Thank you in advance for standing with other conservatives who are banding together to fight for the changes they want to see at the federal, state, and local levels.

Grateful for your support,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

P.S. In an uncertain economy and during a time of year when many Americans are feeling the financial pinch, this is the perfect opportunity to stretch your dollar and achieve real change for you and your families in 2023. [**Please click here to give whatever you can today »**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98867%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UxqEUjvRSzqisTeVQPAAdA&sysid=1)
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7652%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=r6snX6yi%2b%2fb3Nct%2bMnhzkQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7652%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=r6snX6yi%2b%2fb3Nct%2bMnhzkQ&sysid=1)

I’m truly encouraged that so many patriots have answered the call to help restore America’s guiding principles and are I am truly grateful that there are so many who are willing to take action and give what they can to help create the American future they want for themselves, their families, and all American children. ACI has developed an ambitious plan to restore and defend the values that matter most to you in the coming year. Your gift today will help accomplish great things in 2023: You will help share “Little Patriots,” a free online K-5 curriculum, with parents, grandparents, and educators who want to teach kids about America’s founding principles and timeless values You will be part of critical legal battles and policy debates aimed at protecting religious liberty, individual freedom, the rights of the unborn, and other Constitutional principles You will sustain and expand successful faith-based outreach and voter registration initiatives that educate the faithful about the importance of exercising their right to vote You will help Dr. Carson bring national leaders together for meaningful discussions about the state of our nation and to collaborate on conservative solutions to the challenges facing America And when you give whatever your budget allows, Right now, the conservative movement has an incredible opportunity to build on the momentum we have gained over the past year. But if we don’t act now, far-left elements of our society will stop at nothing to undo all we have accomplished. We can’t let this happen. And I need your help to get our great nation back on track. And whatever you’re able to give today will have twice the impact, and will do twice the good, as it would at any other time of year! Thank you in advance for standing with other conservatives who are banding together to fight for the changes they want to see at the federal, state, and local levels. Grateful for your support, Dr. Ben Carson Founder and Chairman American Cornerstone Institute P.S. In an uncertain economy and during a time of year when many Americans are feeling the financial pinch, this is the perfect opportunity to stretch your dollar and achieve real change for you and your families in 2023. | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Dave Kubal
subject: Re: Your invitation
body:
Christians are experiencing opposition and censorship in the United States of America.
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Prayer Warrior,Christians are experiencing opposition and censorship in the United States of America.The values we hold dear are disappearing...The institutions we’ve relied on throughout history have been overrun with corruption...There’s a lot to burden the hearts of folks like you and me.But today, I wanted to share a message of encouragement to you:You have a place to come home to right here at Intercessors for America.[**Will you accept this personal invitation to take your place at our table today with a gift of any amount, my friend?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z60mj4umqirev4n9v1stgot16nhcnrdbdqruumig_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctg66o72c1h2bs) We’ve prepared a place just for you — and you’ll find not just thousands – **but hundreds of thousands of other believers** here who are like-minded, ready to pray for you, and willing to join with you in taking back the ground that we, as Americans of faith, have lost in recent years.If you’ve never heard of Intercessors for America (IFA), that’s OK — you’ll be hearing a lot more about us very soon.But we’re not the “new kids on the block” by any stretch of the imagination.We were founded in 1973 — the same year _Roe_ v. _Wade_ was handed down...... the same year that we began praying without ceasing for the repentance of a nation which lost its way on this and other issues. **Never giving up, never doubting that God was listening...** ... with thanksgiving for the privilege of living in a country where we were free to bring our prayers of intercession before a loving Father. I believe that God is not only **_not done_** with the United States of America, but that He is about to do even mightier things using the men and women of faith who are coming home to the Intercessors for America! [**Please consider joining our community today with a tax-deductible gift of $1, $25, $100 or even more if you feel called.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zveopp9ghjh2ied1911vq5m5nerq7h76hmpenfo0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctg66o72c1h2bs) We know that God has His hand on this ministry — and that we I think that once you’ve accepted this invitation to join our community, and you start to see the many benefits of being a part of IFA, you’ll wonder why you didn’t “come home” sooner.
---
| |
* We offer news from a Conservative, Christian point of view, uncompromising and honest.
* We are what you might call the nation’s biggest prayer team — your invitation itself offers room for you to let us know how we can pray for you starting right now!
* We bring the voices of Americans of faith straight to Capitol Hill, the White House and even to your state and local representatives through Action Alerts you can send to their offices.
* We produce educational pieces through all kinds of media to expose the radical, anti-biblical agenda of some of the most powerful people in the world.
* And we equip Americans of faith to fight back!

---
| | The bottom line is that Christians — TRUE Christians — need a place to come home to right now when it comes to where they get their news, how we organize to pray and act against the radical left, and especially a place to intercede for each other.In the desert of our media, politics and the cultural battle, Intercessors for America is there for you.But we also need you! [**If you feel called to join IFA today, please donate any tax-deductible gift now to equip our nonprofit with the tools we need to keep reaching prayer warriors like you.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhcqhi3k215puj9bbkbon9nunhin310n5r739f68_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctg66o72c1h2bs) Thank you so much for taking the time to read my message today. This is our invitation to you to become the newest member of Intercessors for America!
---
| | God bless you,
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsorr0acdqt7gavtoij8mf3k722qi4r85nmt8iig_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctg66o72c1h2bs)
---
Dave KubalPresident & CEO Intercessors for America (IFA)
---
P.S. Welcome home! If you’re burdened by the direction of our country, discouraged by the news, or at your wit’s end as to how to fight back, then I wrote to the right person today. IFA is where you belong. [**Please accept your invitation to join our community of prayer warriors with a one-time, tax-deductible gift of any amount here.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znho4m574d8981rr6c8sn57roc012bb4go9v0mlo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctg66o72c1h2bs)
---
[**ACCEPT YOUR INVITATION**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9kiikqu62vbfg75g5stedsptqa0neo9lklf26v8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctg66o72c1h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbi75fok3tv42v47jfujcbfgeekt6raeac3njlo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctg66o72c1h2bs)
---
Intercessors for America (IFA) is a 501(c)(3) ministry organization and was founded in 1973 when God impressed upon the hearts of a group of godly, respected men the necessity of prayer and fasting.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zk7n949qs5nj22jdlaccr0nedq2p499ktp9mqr40_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctg66o72c1h2bs)| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zccmqvlh1fl0c54915q9gc0e8ljmvne2gbiifrog_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctg66o72c1h2bs)| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbeharhhl73fsqdn6f7le0he6hhmit7rqinamtk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctg66o72c1h2bs)
---|---|---

body:
How I'm going to make it happen
---

---
| Fellow Patriot,
**I’m officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress.**
If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy...**[I need you to help us mount a pressure campaign over the next 4 weeks.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcnh2h9j6vgkrk2gd836a9sp4rh7issakvth3ih8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctg66o72cdh2bs)**
My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge.

**Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage** to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.

Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he’ll stab us in the back every chance he gets.

For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. **I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game.**

I’ll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most.

We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden’s radicalism and BREAK the Establishment’s stranglehold on this nation. **McCarthy won’t fight for us...so we’ve got to do it ourselves.**

But we only have a couple weeks before Congress picks our new Speaker. **[We need you to LEAD this fight and power our pressure campaign.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zda4v72l34lgr30rrf1cuph0j298otg24cehpgro_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctg66o72cdh2bs)**

Andy Biggs

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is here
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zm1m1mji4aqdmfmbti4p4b6pbvs3mnj71hlk4s50_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctg66o74cdh2bs)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zb525h2fh8dh4teigc2rua8dd3nuofulba9mdao8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctg66o74cdh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zc2i6lve5loslsh1tn963ds3dckhquk0uo08asig_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctg66o74cdh2bs)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We're offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zi6873364ufts6uebkttdh1lu8t9rumtfgpumdhg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctg66o74cdh2bs) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I'm excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along: From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews. From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham. In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently. And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus! | | | The Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day. | | We're offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to Pathway to Victory this month. And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31. To support the work God is doing through Pathway to Victory , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I'm excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
Big Democrat names are now calling her nomination "illegitimate"
Friend, this is urgent:
We emailed you just a few days ago requesting your support to stand with Supreme Court Justice Amy Coney Barrett... **but not enough Patriots stepped up to help.**
This is serious: the Liberal Mob is rushing to collect hundreds of thousands of signatures to remove our beloved Conservative Supreme Court justice and REPLACE her with a Liberal activist appointed by Joe Biden! But it gets even worse: _Big Democrat names are now calling her nomination "illegitimate" laying the groundwork for EXPELLING her!_
[**We 'll only ask you once more: Sign on to STAND WITH AMY CONEY BARRETT before the Liberal Mob formally moves to expel her!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4cfvbsfdss4rhmt2uv9tjf8ppailjpe5ul2gs68_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctg61or4c1h2bs)

_Trust us, the Liberal Mob isn 't wasting a second. They're gaining lots -- possibly thousands -- of new supporters every single day. _
[**Respond right now and help us save Amy Coney Barrett before it 's too late. **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2uaddf90mikesbqvtglvga5micc1j9b84k437ag_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctg61or4c1h2bs)
Thank you,
Breaking Supreme Court Update
Sent via Team Scalise
_To see our original communication to you about this crisis, read the following message:_

__________________________________________________
__
**Forwarded Message: Amy Coney Barrett forced off the Supreme Court bench??**
****
_**INTERCEPTED:** The Far-Left's petition to impeach beloved Conservative Supreme Court Justice Amy Coney Barrett! _
_[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbdkqkhpepn0lr37vegblnb94v2gfs47htr7tc4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctg61or4c1h2bs)_
Far-Left Democrats have almost reached their goal -- we have to move NOW. [**We need 20,000 Patriots to go on the record and STAND WITH Amy Coney Barrett RIGHT HERE AND RIGHT NOW >> **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkn2pqpj22i3i1nutbb72atk09giv5okm5gl59r8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctg61or4c1h2bs)

__
This story is developing in real time. Democrats were FURIOUS when Republicans appointed Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court. They knew she would stand up for our Pro-Life values, 2nd Amendment Rights, and religious freedoms.
__
_Now, Democrats are trying any desperate attempt to force Amy Coney Barrett off the court and replace her with a Far-Left Radical!_
__
[**We need the full force of our grassroots network to make their nationwide petition backfire. We 're calling on at least 20,000 Patriots to go on the record by midnight tonight to stand with Amy Coney Barrett, a Republican-nominated Supreme Court Justice.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9jc4ka6jei1nn6kadenmt11s1io7k7o9enctp1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctg61or4c1h2bs)
__
If Democrats take control of the Supreme Court, they'll destroy our Conservative legacy in the blink of an eye.
__
_We can 't let them get away with sidelining one of our best Supreme Court Justices. _
__
[**Stand with Amy Coney Barrett today by adding your e-signature to our petition before the Radical Left impeaches her. **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zusl2l1uvhehe0d6j7gvv3jlebsst2uf6umur588_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctg61or4c1h2bs)
__
******[STAND WITH AMY CONEY BARRETT >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zln0j3gmbncj4i1231ktd36fo9ul7cs8df787038_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctg61or4c1h2bs)**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Where things stand
body:
With limited time remaining in our year-end fundraising campaign, I wanted to make sure you knew exactly where things stand. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0211%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=IBQbU%2bhY3RPW3lUrKaaiQQ&sysid=1)
ACI - Giving Tuesday 2022 |
---
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43460%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2b5Q%2by82zgEf5RLQl0cU2Yw&sysid=1)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

With limited time remaining in our year-end fundraising campaign, I wanted to make sure you knew exactly where things stand.

I’m truly encouraged that so many patriots have answered the call to help restore America’s guiding principles and are [so willing to work together to create a better path forward for our republic.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43461%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2q3UHrph3xZs2%2bK5cajnBw&sysid=1)

I am truly grateful that there are so many who are willing to take action and give what they can to help create the American future they want for themselves, their families, and all American children.

**[**But we are still short of our goal --and time is running out.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43462%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vT4mPuFw8%2bCc6DQMNbL0RA&sysid=1)**

ACI has developed an ambitious plan to restore and defend the values that matter most to you in the coming year. [But we need your help to fund the initiatives we have planned.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43463%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kzg1GIXKXoXUofEH%2bBpYMQ&sysid=1)

**Your gift today will help accomplish great things in 2023:**
* You will help share “Little Patriots,” a free online K-5 curriculum, with parents, grandparents, and educators who want to teach kids about America’s founding principles and timeless values
* You will be part of critical legal battles and policy debates aimed at protecting religious liberty, individual freedom, the rights of the unborn, and other Constitutional principles
* You will sustain and expand successful faith-based outreach and voter registration initiatives that educate the faithful about the importance of exercising their right to vote
* You will help Dr. Carson bring national leaders together for meaningful discussions about the state of our nation and to collaborate on conservative solutions to the challenges facing America

**And when you give whatever your budget allows,[**your investment in our nation’s future will automatically be doubled by our $100,000 matching gift challenge.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43464%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3VrfW%2bIsA6HviFN8m6j6Gw&sysid=1)**

Right now, the conservative movement has an incredible opportunity to build on the momentum we have gained over the past year. But if we don’t act now, far-left elements of our society will stop at nothing to undo all we have accomplished.

We can’t let this happen. And I need your help to get our great nation back on track.

[Please join me by making a meaningful gift of whatever your budget allows--no gift is too small.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43475%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jDQCRn%2f5xyM87mqjdJtaMg&sysid=1) And whatever you’re able to give today will have twice the impact, and will do twice the good, as it would at any other time of year!

Thank you in advance for standing with other conservatives who are banding together to fight for the changes they want to see at the federal, state, and local levels.

Grateful for your support,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

P.S. In an uncertain economy and during a time of year when many Americans are feeling the financial pinch, this is the perfect opportunity to stretch your dollar and achieve real change for you and your families in 2023. [**Please click here to give whatever you can today »**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43476%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MhAJvRkKiSPG21SfcEaa8w&sysid=1)
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0211%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=IBQbU%2bhY3RPW3lUrKaaiQQ&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0211%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=IBQbU%2bhY3RPW3lUrKaaiQQ&sysid=1)

name: ICYMI News
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z93e6g3pge9uqp7apfrh66b61aj7h8ji3jo6g2e0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti60ob4c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj08af22a3kbvsk5c8t5dhck9bjdi2ltcuupn71g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti60ob4c5h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zaennhjk8h481jq52d3jl1med5loip4j3if6mdv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti60ob4c5h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt9m1ns31vdk1u8hqdttj8hpgbmbaq4aqnshepuo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti60ob4c5h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Andy Biggs
subject: My plan to defeat McCarthy and restore conservative power in Congress >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
How I'm going to make it happen
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6s8q7fuopmv78doq7npgv2qik0uohl36sts420g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti60ob2c1h2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
**I’m officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress.**
If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy...**[I need you to help us mount a pressure campaign over the next 4 weeks.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqqf20quc2b1rcdcmc9hm7548oulu2org7nlh780_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti60ob2c1h2bs)**
My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge.
**[Pitch in just $30 to turbocharge our emergency efforts to break the Establishment and elect a CONSERVATIVE Speaker of the House >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrlcvtqucs0sg7ls49cug28fm7lgkaq0u2iclfoo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti60ob2c1h2bs)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH $30](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr9vaqh5euofkch1nu8fe24htvm7h6dqavncmu78_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti60ob2c1h2bs)
---
**Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage** to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.

Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he’ll stab us in the back every chance he gets.

For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. **I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game.**

I’ll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most.

We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden’s radicalism and BREAK the Establishment’s stranglehold on this nation. **McCarthy won’t fight for us...so we’ve got to do it ourselves.**

But we only have a couple weeks before Congress picks our new Speaker. **[We need you to LEAD this fight and power our pressure campaign.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf771r2uqfdc6v1jn97jakukqap9f8nu59d7km6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti60ob2c1h2bs)**

**[Just $30—or anything you can afford—will make sure Congress knows the stakes and feels the heat. Come through for this nation with an emergency gift >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdvsd6cgn29tshe5d50n49gm5pk7rnn03q5ni5h8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti60ob2c1h2bs)**

Yours in Freedom,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Where things stand
body:
With limited time remaining in our year-end fundraising campaign, I wanted to make sure you knew exactly where things stand.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoe4hf28ck30fquf9n434etedsleco7pamm57tp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti64oj2c1h2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

With limited time remaining in our year-end fundraising campaign, I wanted to make sure you knew exactly where things stand.

I'm truly encouraged that so many patriots have answered the call to help restore America's guiding principles and are [so willing to work together to create a better path forward for our republic.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmu10ih4qhdd4o653fjme86g0234im2j0mpg195o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti64oj2c1h2bs)

I am truly grateful that there are so many who are willing to take action and give what they can to help create the American future they want for themselves, their families, and all American children.

**[**But we are still short of our goal --and time is running out.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi0ehhnmhqlfu5ophloevff52dm1b0jk0drvia00_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti64oj2c1h2bs)**

ACI has developed an ambitious plan to restore and defend the values that matter most to you in the coming year. [But we need your help to fund the initiatives we have planned.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhhpcr0on5g0j14of317k0giiarm63ukrlcdhfa8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti64oj2c1h2bs)

**Your gift today will help accomplish great things in 2023:**
* You will help share "Little Patriots," a free online K-5 curriculum, with parents, grandparents, and educators who want to teach kids about America's founding principles and timeless values
* You will be part of critical legal battles and policy debates aimed at protecting religious liberty, individual freedom, the rights of the unborn, and other Constitutional principles
* You will sustain and expand successful faith-based outreach and voter registration initiatives that educate the faithful about the importance of exercising their right to vote
* You will help Dr. Carson bring national leaders together for meaningful discussions about the state of our nation and to collaborate on conservative solutions to the challenges facing America

**And when you give whatever your budget allows,[**your investment in our nation 's future will automatically be doubled by our $100,000 matching gift challenge.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpdlm5561geas14cub9ssrblpnmtlrk7kli1fr68_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti64oj2c1h2bs)**

Right now, the conservative movement has an incredible opportunity to build on the momentum we have gained over the past year. But if we don't act now, far-left elements of our society will stop at nothing to undo all we have accomplished.

We can't let this happen. And I need your help to get our great nation back on track.

[Please join me by making a meaningful gift of whatever your budget allows--no gift is too small.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z954ofq3m5cklmgfltln5ttue1abvj3p6g6d7s8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti64oj2c1h2bs) And whatever you're able to give today will have twice the impact, and will do twice the good, as it would at any other time of year!

Thank you in advance for standing with other conservatives who are banding together to fight for the changes they want to see at the federal, state, and local levels.

Grateful for your support,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

P.S. In an uncertain economy and during a time of year when many Americans are feeling the financial pinch, this is the perfect opportunity to stretch your dollar and achieve real change for you and your families in 2023. [**Please click here to give whatever you can today »**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbdd1pubkbgrd0bhjfc8aguf8ih3778ma50e4s7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti64oj2c1h2bs)
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

name: Kari Lake
subject: The law is on our side.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc
body:
| [ ](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1hshfje5guqjm5dgdlo55auve5eq40klqhnfs48_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti62o36cjh2bs)
---
The Fake News is lying.

**The law is on our side.**

I've filed one of the **STRONGEST** and **LARGEST** election lawsuits in history to get answers for the rigged and corrupt electoral disaster that has shocked this great nation.

**If the process was illegitimate, Then so are the results.**

name: James C. Roberts, American Veterans Center
subject: Send a note of support to all who served this Holiday season
body:
This Christmas season, the American Veterans Center is preparing a massive Christmas Card to share with veterans across the nati
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6st1bvgv2c2s5gdachdn9hnae7b5iagr2mfa080_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti62o32c3h2bs)
---
Friend, This Christmas season, the American Veterans Center is preparing a massive Christmas Card to share with veterans across the nation. The American Veterans Center does more than _any other organization_ to tell the stories and preserve the legacies of America’s heroes. It’s been our honor to be trusted by work with thousands of veterans, from World War II to Iraq and Afghanistan. [**We've set a goal of 50,000 signatures for this special card by Christmas Eve, December 24th. Will you add your name now it?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgh026uqle07lvepekdvrfuv155r1ud5spva1gr8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti62o32c3h2bs)
---
[**Sign AVC's Veteran Christmas Card**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zs74ih874p2tts8pdnm5otpg43br41p7likkbs40_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti62o32c3h2bs)
---
This holiday season, just like every year, it's vitally important to show our heroic veterans the support the deserve. **By reaching our goal of 50,000 signatures, we're sending a message of support to let all those who have served know that patriotic Americans will forever remain thankful for their sacrifice for our nation.** _And we’ll share the Christmas card signatures and personal notes of support with veterans from World War II through to today._ As thousands of the courageous men and women who served in World War II, Korea, Vietnam and beyond leave us each day, it is our duty to let those who have served know that we have not _and will not_ forget their sacrifice. [**Friend, will you please add your name to this special Christmas card to let our heroic veterans know that they are remembered this holiday season?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ze06e532h5q7ic1afak1ebo9eo2i71ml25tmk228_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti62o32c3h2bs)
---
[**Sign AVC's Veteran Christmas Card**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zpdbm3e7sp96o01oc0uivb557uf31i9rir2ma9ho_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti62o32c3h2bs)
---
As we prepare to celebrate the joy of Christmas, we ask that you join us in supporting American veterans, by sending them a special and meaningful Christmas greeting from their fellow Americans. According to the U.S. Census Bureau's most recent study, there are currently about 16.5 million veterans in the United States. The majority of them served during the Vietnam War era and are over the age of 75. Those brave men and women put their lives on the line to preserve our freedom at home, and now it’s up to us to show them that we remember and appreciate their service and sacrifice — especially in this holiday season. [**I hope you’ll take just a moment to do that right now by signing AVC’s Christmas Card.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgvqhc9bt1grtibdskojticguii2kq9o36eni5h8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti62o32c3h2bs)
---
[**Sign AVC's Veteran Christmas Card**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z336do8v4jdfd3kf0uhacmudunsidog3054l2cmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti62o32c3h2bs)
---
Thank you, Merry Christmas, and God bless our heroic veterans!
---
James Roberts Chairman & Founder American Veterans Center
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3ik4vlvgopmrfvjp9asmrvegtsn6ro0kutqa808_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti62o32c3h2bs)
---
|
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

body:
How I'm going to make it happen
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znt1rij454845j0meb2ufm360sjjgu8lv1r2r1lo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti62o36clh2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
**I’m officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress.**
If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy...**[I need you to help us mount a pressure campaign over the next 4 weeks.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zucfnmgschslmqaog0m1p5f9gqikm88kv2a87e8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti62o36clh2bs)**
My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge.
**[Pitch in just $30 to turbocharge our emergency efforts to break the Establishment and elect a CONSERVATIVE Speaker of the House >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1lqgt9kqhpg2t40enmcl7dh32jgucu4k8k02qb0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti62o36clh2bs)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH $30](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0u7al0bphspq604t5snuba380qme7bkh7etbdco_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti62o36clh2bs)
---
**Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage** to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.

Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he’ll stab us in the back every chance he gets.

For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. **I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game.**

I’ll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most.

We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden’s radicalism and BREAK the Establishment’s stranglehold on this nation. **McCarthy won’t fight for us...so we’ve got to do it ourselves.**

But we only have a couple weeks before Congress picks our new Speaker. **[We need you to LEAD this fight and power our pressure campaign.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zss1137a841mhmbmfn4hckqb253ptf93anva6scg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti62o36clh2bs)**

**[Just $30—or anything you can afford—will make sure Congress knows the stakes and feels the heat. Come through for this nation with an emergency gift >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjt1001b75l9ikd83ipmrjv5ru4ifgoqbabbv8sg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti62o36clh2bs)**

Yours in Freedom,

Andy Biggs

name: Your America
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7678%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=5A3ymPY%2fxcSifoC3WPpOaw&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98869%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JzQlwEax4EgspRWKR5084Q&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98860%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JLf1dWtnKWbCE%2fvHtSyBTw&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98861%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qKXIgUF8RR12%2bLKxkMa2gw&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98862%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GrJRtq64R%2fz0%2bhnvhs1rBQ&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7678%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=5A3ymPY%2fxcSifoC3WPpOaw&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7678%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=5A3ymPY%2fxcSifoC3WPpOaw&sysid=1)

body:

---
| This is ridiculous, Peter.
The Passaic County school superintendent just told parents that MASKS ARE BACK in their schools as of yesterday.
This move comes JUST DAYS after the school district hosted a maskless Christmas party for their teachers and staff.
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001omEhjszmo9AAmumhdy20Fu1dcz0wLc5SZEKxdyBt6Nt447wCSzdWN-n1FkblCyQKZAwZvgWKuiFhHsnVBZVfqxDCRxn6H2nAyiTdKxPzsWCiuBfStU4nBytxrz6BtIMDkENujMblzH4L1PCgZZnJuSwYvj5a_cOf8V47Jy6mrwqVP5twJZ45_oLyzLqHoHWYL15W42di1mRaSyxUC0tR6jiMSgOrzXn-fcTCXMY_sNnHsTWqtIiaYu_2C5ASNvZOQ1JH99iyhG_QnhXCAjctfpV_AwJ08r_u53UxwepCg-o4gyn6Y-IjJBkSJakznUHcUD7yU1CMQFY4CxoD5rakXe97yKf_P2RNb8Cbf14NSCY=&c=Uy2YerZ94lUQv5TGLyqP-MYafx6-0fB13BIsh0vxhMy7-VxuedakIA==&ch=1SwJSX-Epi-bUjm5pm4d591s8QRPrxmLdmPvAFHFXxES-x-LzTCamA==)
---
In typical fashion, the Passaic school system proved that they care more about enforcing their ridiculous mandates on students than they do about education itself.
It's time for parents not just in Passaic, but across New Jersey, to stand up and say Enough is Enough!
We will NOT let these teachers' unions and school districts destroy our children's education with their COVID hysteria.
We will NOT let them stunt our children's social and educational growth.
And we will NOT let them force masks on our children.
If you can, chip in today to help us fight back against these outrageous masking rules here in New Jersey and to help protect the education of our children.

name: Andy Biggs
subject: My plan to defeat McCarthy and restore conservative power in Congress >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
How I'm going to make it happen
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkulu0alqfcofjeqj9rsg06gnrvjv41mnclifr80_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti6eor1cjh2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
**I’m officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress.**
If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy...**[I need you to help us mount a pressure campaign over the next 4 weeks.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs37muqdnf8k11rgboje9co9oed9t6f70ks4dtdg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti6eor1cjh2bs)**
My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge.
**[Pitch in just $30 to turbocharge our emergency efforts to break the Establishment and elect a CONSERVATIVE Speaker of the House >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1i9t4nhqvkmrhdchj72lrr2h219b6up4oepe77g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti6eor1cjh2bs)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH $30](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7gkpojrnsl1idd90poe8nc7abg4mr396dhaklto_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti6eor1cjh2bs)
---
**Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage** to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.

Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he’ll stab us in the back every chance he gets.

For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. **I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game.**

I’ll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most.

We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden’s radicalism and BREAK the Establishment’s stranglehold on this nation. **McCarthy won’t fight for us...so we’ve got to do it ourselves.**

But we only have a couple weeks before Congress picks our new Speaker. **[We need you to LEAD this fight and power our pressure campaign.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl7qs8jorhefmasrjnau4n8vtjrslonakerm50g0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti6eor1cjh2bs)**

**[Just $30—or anything you can afford—will make sure Congress knows the stakes and feels the heat. Come through for this nation with an emergency gift >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z33l6ldocipq5cikv64usvlmb1606h0so9b1nnug_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti6eor1cjh2bs)**
| | | [FIGHT WITH $30](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z60t124sshfs6rk0od9cmfqm9hsns5mrogs4keno_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti6eor1cjh2bs)
---
| | | [FIGHT WITH $55](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfjn7in9i0ctv0ru85etjnm0ov5ve6auf9f5f8g8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti6eor1cjh2bs)
---
| | | [FIGHT WITH $80](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6bk0hqemic3vfj40gudmpsgct1s3uc1l671aj78_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti6eor1cjh2bs)
---
Yours in Freedom,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z274kltdr95m66ce20c8ivf77glb4a75mbi54hjo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti6eor1cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdrkgf9n2ichn5vo5rj7fnvs84tpb7bg3q0cnk10_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti6eor1cdh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdvqkp4g6j6d08ars3nb50bit04qhni93t2bpak0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti6eor1cdh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6chsd41v0v4pe60143lh5snkvptqctgjtag0cgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti6eor1cdh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: the work continues, especially during this holiday season
body:
I am reminded of the importance of helping and being there for each other, especially during the holidays.
| | |
---
Dear Derek,

I often find myself, as I do at the end of the year, pausing to reflect on all that we've accomplished together and reminding myself to take a deep breath (or two!) before we are in the frenzied stretch of the holiday season.

I am reminded of the importance of helping and being there for each other, especially during the holidays.
**That's why I wanted to reach out to you today and tell you about Chester County Food Bank, ****a _fantastic_ program right here in our community that is doing amazing work!**

This organization has been working day in and day out, every year, to help provide emergency relief for families who are struggling to get food on the table, and I've been so grateful to get the chance to tour their facility and volunteer in their community gardens.**Here's how you can help out too:**
* **Donate:** If you have the means to do so, consider making a gift of any amount you can. Every dollar will make a big difference in their critical work to distribute meals to families who are in need. **[Click here to donate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56277744/384476224/60156072?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODgxOGE1Mi0wOTgyLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VT_Zbk2eh1x9_U8z2sNFp6P-zoYzV_HBt9LZQtqmvkU=&emci=5487cf02-947c-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=d8818a52-0982-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=21278485)**

* **Volunteer:** I can't think of a better way to make a difference in folks' lives than to be there for them – and I say this from personal experience. Chester County Food Bank is always in need of volunteers to help pack food boxes for those in need. So please, if you're healthy and feel safe doing so, [**click here to sign up to be a volunteer**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56277745/384476226/827560512?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODgxOGE1Mi0wOTgyLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VT_Zbk2eh1x9_U8z2sNFp6P-zoYzV_HBt9LZQtqmvkU=&emci=5487cf02-947c-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=d8818a52-0982-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=21278485).

Finally, if you need food for yourself and your loved ones right now, **[you can click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56277746/384476227/-1755451740?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODgxOGE1Mi0wOTgyLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VT_Zbk2eh1x9_U8z2sNFp6P-zoYzV_HBt9LZQtqmvkU=&emci=5487cf02-947c-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=d8818a52-0982-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=21278485) **to find your local food bank and get access to the resources you need right in your neighborhood.
Seeing so many Americans step up to lend a helping hand throughout the year gives me a profound sense of gratitude.

Thank you so much for all you do, and all my best wishes to you and your family for a safe and healthy holiday season.

– Chrissy
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333
United States Emails are a crucial way for us to stay in touch with our top supporters; however, we understand if you need a break from political emails right now. If you'd like to pause emails for the next few weeks, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56277747/384476229/-1727112621?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODgxOGE1Mi0wOTgyLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VT_Zbk2eh1x9_U8z2sNFp6P-zoYzV_HBt9LZQtqmvkU=&emci=5487cf02-947c-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=d8818a52-0982-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=21278485). If you'd like to receive fewer emails like this one, or if you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/5A7dcVDqPECR0EWykGJMlQ2?unsubscribedata=yqY9%2Bzf0GteS56Y6naVE7u2ruJ8AYpHks8fIVatMHZRCob944WfreLZAZteYwb%2F5PPpA0IQ0RGhn8xOWHxfFzQa3ePvcGLFmNKae05YxEXciwJKyJvDsPWQ7GbTQic%2FHQbls2wjxloP96IzAi0XgfXrfVZAcyx%2FEUB%2B18%2F%2FRMKZRCQIEHltfytetAJsLeaiW%2Bdf2P0X1Na01nRqydSITPeYGi3C53%2BQpRMnAMxP4SUdT4rNif9ylTH%2FfX5dJjs2y8ZPflqREwZe70TYFvDl8hXZPXkEmAop21P9I%2FugfTO9aadW0Xo7F2GoyD8ChSeZ1FhdsowIy5O4jQlMvSi4eFFKmxmMGSKQxjOyUECQ5FsRoxQI9Hs7wctunJQHdd64e4WjSoWPguLq2BHlNk7jvrdgoPtbZ4dXIZjVZ4zG8ND34V9dfmwow856CjVfLbmbV) Chrissy is a former Captain in the United States Air Force. Use of her military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or Department of the Air Force. |

name: American Action News
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuc5ikibvn9ontbskd1riqs4v2ecm9u7806opvvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti69ob4cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaguhenvej50e2nhh126vcme8remjos5d3p3vicg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti69ob4cdh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn7ps4r3hpr9d2dm44t5vns4u5g67vn5s83ap540_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti69ob4cdh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt49fvsel1tv2obaosp87bp1uk3hjpub6jund70g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cti69ob4cdh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

body:

| Fellow Patriot,
**I’m officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress.**
If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy...**[I need you to help us mount a pressure campaign over the next 4 weeks.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43479%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fKRQ2QmY2yAYEif%2fuo8ySA&sysid=1)**
My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge.

**Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage** to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.

Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he’ll stab us in the back every chance he gets.

For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. **I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game.**

I’ll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most.

We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden’s radicalism and BREAK the Establishment’s stranglehold on this nation. **McCarthy won’t fight for us...so we’ve got to do it ourselves.**

But we only have a couple weeks before Congress picks our new Speaker. **[We need you to LEAD this fight and power our pressure campaign.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43472%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2mbMLoxl25bM1ZTI%2bKVOIA&sysid=1)**

Peter, I _refuse_ to sit here and do nothing while millions of people in our nation are denied essential reproductive care. I’m counting on you to join the movement. So please: **Will you add your name to my reproductive freedom petition before it locks at midnight tonight?

Here’s the best link: [https://petitions.signforgood.com/LJ4NY22-1122-repro-right](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56278972/384480728/1636200151?code=jtk930-su-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY22-repro-rights-1122&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmRlMTcwNS0wYTgyLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VbGwmawTT7TQ4xwDRIhTiHgkBzHNnFO7A8Q7Wpi21kc=&emci=cfd4959c-9b7c-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=9bde1705-0a82-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=25369504)**

**Peter, this election cycle, reproductive freedom was on the ballot.**

And Americans in several states – from Kentucky to Vermont – resoundingly rejected the GOP’s attempts to take away our right to choose. This is an incredibly powerful first step in our fight to protect reproductive rights after Roe v. Wade was overturned – but we cannot relent.

**[Peter, will you add your name now to my petition to protect reproductive rights? I need 592 more signatures before midnight tonight, and I’m still missing YOUR response.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56278977/384480732/1636200151?code=jtk930-su-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY22-repro-rights-1122&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmRlMTcwNS0wYTgyLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VbGwmawTT7TQ4xwDRIhTiHgkBzHNnFO7A8Q7Wpi21kc=&emci=cfd4959c-9b7c-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=9bde1705-0a82-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=25369504)**

Now that Democrats have officially lost the House of Representatives, reproductive rights continue to be in a precarious position. **That’s why I’m calling on fearless fighters like you to step up now and join my fight to protect the right to choose.

Let me be clear:** I will not accept a future where Americans are denied access to essential health care products and services. Since the moment Roe v. Wade was struck down this summer, I’ve fought tirelessly to make New York a safe haven for all those seeking reproductive care, and I’m proud to say that we’ve already made _real_ progress.

I’ve fought in court against state laws that outlaw abortion with no exceptions, convened a task force to assist reproductive health care providers and patients in this new legal landscape, and called for the creation of an abortion fund – all because I know that abortion access is a social justice issue.

**But, Peter, we can only win this fight for reproductive freedom if we _all_ work together. That’s why I set a goal to collect 5,000 signatures on my reproductive rights petition before midnight tonight – and I’m counting on you to step up now.

[Will you please take 30 seconds to add your name to my petition to protect reproductive rights? With the House now under Republican control, we cannot lose our momentum in this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56278980/384480736/1636200151?code=jtk930-su-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY22-repro-rights-1122&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmRlMTcwNS0wYTgyLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VbGwmawTT7TQ4xwDRIhTiHgkBzHNnFO7A8Q7Wpi21kc=&emci=cfd4959c-9b7c-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=9bde1705-0a82-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=25369504)**

We can 't let them get away with sidelining one of our best Supreme Court Justices. **** Thank you, SCOTUS ALERTS Sent via Team Scalise Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. 320 First Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
