| | | Hi Friend, its South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem!

As an unapologetic Conservative, the Fake News media has said a lot about me these last few years, but now I'm ready to set the record straight and tell my story in my own words.

**And that 's why I'm so excited to offer you an exclusive copy of my new memoir _Not My First Rodeo_.** Plus, if you claim your copy today, I'll even sign it, Friend.

But here's the thing -- I am only offering this exclusive opportunity to a very limited number of conservative supporters. So this might be your only chance to claim your very owned signed copy.

_**[Claim your signed copy now before I have to offer this to another top Conservative supporter!](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=75caf11a3b914df3a5093d5fbf428c1b&_e=sIn77fxSTmlsexNpypDbFnA3Lb4FZRKGhUVMF1wWhLs_8q83ONiRrCin_R7bk97t-1pvtirX3dpfEZEds5yH9VmwbO6c2kCvppT8c4NXreUOe2Ih3U4_NFJPx9Xq8-oMqkzxpi2FkGavOz4Y45qFIzqIbIG74roSt2M6iL0aTBojW9ddyL02cCTMS6iIpHXrKgBCPumYgPZMNsR--sZ6Zg8X3eiP0FOoyPrWv5wMEj7Bbn6FBcvi9-vksb3EqSmnkbb_qeMnl2ZWcShMOY5JxRXwi2Sxf_Tp8to1orajNMRZM7NBnI7zud6AcrBcJi8nur8yxhAeIx4RoNNkCsbkAaMFyJCtHlVK_EhiN49m9e2Xq4LC_xfFKoZan2e3XjyPCGt0FL13kzADghWW8RQARjFqr4DhwZNn13dxdnXDWUii_n62VN--Uye1YEOhc3AZ "Claim your signed copy now before I have to offer this to another top Conservative supporter!")**_

From growing up on a ranch, to serving in Congress, and now leading my home state as Governor, I'll share with you the humorous stories and larger than life people who made me who I am today.

_**[But I can't sign one for everybody! So act now to secure your signed copy before this exclusive offer expires >>>](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=75caf11a3b914df3a5093d5fbf428c1b&_e=sIn77fxSTmlsexNpypDbFnA3Lb4FZRKGhUVMF1wWhLs_8q83ONiRrCin_R7bk97t-1pvtirX3dpfEZEds5yH9VmwbO6c2kCvppT8c4NXreUOe2Ih3U4_NFJPx9Xq8-oMqkzxpi2FkGavOz4Y45qFIzqIbIG74roSt2M6iL0aTBojW9ddyL02cCTMS6iIpHXrKgBCPumYgPZMNsR--sZ6Zg8X3eiP0FOoyPrWv5wMEj7Bbn6FBcvi9-vksb3EqSmnkbb_qeMnl2ZWcShMOY5JxRXwi2Sxf_Tp8to1orajNMQRxWKLqf3NYzq669NUkxpB1MvYrbZYapcX2gdvOITtEfLoPAoIdiMODg2Ag79txHhQ-vOyD5wuNLtgReHcDbqebuarKS5MAWH292gxgNjllNXiZcRMP8lS4jS60GzHm8H42OR4GPcBGJIzg5ehyMkr "But I can’t sign one for everybody! | | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fa232cb01ce24b739cc3c56419a444c7&_e=htoDgBAla39ZeyU_1XgsNvjqTpF12IYKcrSSZyQw2vIuADZHRQdTg700qu8cGN5WoKzoT61pYxxFI6sLPIxeUXKqgiMWyLQKieCGFqADAdxXVW5qYATHRd8w5uP_NtjIlt8Sh0rmxQAWfrN4oYsQ5z3OX4KRCzkzd4KMUqY5-HbZBlWV80MhGXa2kCOYZqQ4-bk08e7YYLsVcEJ1F26qeiNRo7lA3s865UdgK646mJ69S2LD8TNk4gfMNH5Zf61kqbrx-fv1GruZNpbysw4ing4WH7ZW_hEfeKt2CpfMNDznF4xgl3bhrLEoDt0CxSFX4R8Vgk6ra78aWJT6zvQPV8pkYdZbQnZIKthPpaGzjfDch8K3IGdHFi9QMbuTAPJN6OOfWF2ohWtMKzyfWjImDDNEWyv9DhP_YkVhg1iyM0QxEVA4pygDPguSKgSXj9zv)" which you can now own on DVD.

| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fa232cb01ce24b739cc3c56419a444c7&_e=htoDgBAla39ZeyU_1XgsNvjqTpF12IYKcrSSZyQw2vIuADZHRQdTg700qu8cGN5WoKzoT61pYxxFI6sLPIxeUXKqgiMWyLQKieCGFqADAdxXVW5qYATHRd8w5uP_NtjIlt8Sh0rmxQAWfrN4oYsQ5z3OX4KRCzkzd4KMUqY5-HbZBlWV80MhGXa2kCOYZqQ4-bk08e7YYLsVcEJ1F26qeiNRo7lA3s865UdgK646mJ69S2LD8TNk4gfMNH5Zf61kqbrx-fv1GruZNpbysw4innT5uxSjDO4uvhF0arkxWxBnh-KAo_hWTNfdPxfn5skr_FQVtSKoHXrOb3mTxMZ_rPQFgQ11-E3jn_z_lxDkNrK6UxuvpE72oDTeVSeclwJ3MR74wVwvp_uCXBNSGRU8FiLa0Vyeu23hf2EH00a2C4JqcPsYThQH4CH4zqpGdTCo)

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fa232cb01ce24b739cc3c56419a444c7&_e=htoDgBAla39ZeyU_1XgsNvjqTpF12IYKcrSSZyQw2vIuADZHRQdTg700qu8cGN5WoKzoT61pYxxFI6sLPIxeUXKqgiMWyLQKieCGFqADAdxXVW5qYATHRd8w5uP_NtjIlt8Sh0rmxQAWfrN4oYsQ5z3OX4KRCzkzd4KMUqY5-HbZBlWV80MhGXa2kCOYZqQ4-bk08e7YYLsVcEJ1F26qeiNRo7lA3s865UdgK646mJ69S2LD8TNk4gfMNH5Zf61kqbrx-fv1GruZNpbysw4ingdaQcgeg3_rISZ-uPfXWKi7vMDB0jzCsjEaE27yItu4gnm5uax4_j5tK6SBm_LZZME76DKLYUlmGw7c5v1zc6PE2ThTWdcaru9p_pSslhZGOyPnC30gdyIRwhLEvkGOn3JLh6TkXCUyPw8Y3rGYZL8AQ3Ghzg8DbDS7D_xMVh1m).

subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c6084208a1c641a1b3d3350e981f6680&_e=Gkuzjmc8FEuCRZTkasvPIU3mDL4qA_8f_p9XTJ3bMqD1JWdhEorCn0q99lVy-1qrBwSJSn4Erd1_trn6vL2LeaxcI3KYP0alKIJCUBr6JuzsWbU6xBQSQwwsK5vFcbqMX7e0VYLq6k3Vfj0gG-a_FIet-ybz-SKZA6wSlqGUlhOdlwssKPbGqTw51wV1tkQqbu8t2YJkr71sDp6Zojuzsve-Wq2-DeNGgHacV7YduwRaljPrWDzGQc9NW70mKQUdSbpdH38uvdKeXVX6Noz7kQtslQ_CGpxOcFIOPZzI4WXvFN8aWmvOs-6L-A8I2yz0Kg0atZ6dhNL8skXjQNju-I-6Tb6sSQBpwnZcPTNnKZ3aYut1tVscHYojPKqzpRFDBOQkXyFI5vKQWPKTagKLD03pM3EcispXZQ5f81WG6jM4yU8jAzW3-lQUd2v0WHIb)

| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith—making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c6084208a1c641a1b3d3350e981f6680&_e=Gkuzjmc8FEuCRZTkasvPIU3mDL4qA_8f_p9XTJ3bMqD1JWdhEorCn0q99lVy-1qrBwSJSn4Erd1_trn6vL2LeaxcI3KYP0alKIJCUBr6JuzsWbU6xBQSQwwsK5vFcbqMX7e0VYLq6k3Vfj0gG-a_FIet-ybz-SKZA6wSlqGUlhOdlwssKPbGqTw51wV1tkQqbu8t2YJkr71sDp6Zojuzsve-Wq2-DeNGgHacV7YduwRaljPrWDzGQc9NW70mKQUdSbpdH38uvdKeXVX6Noz7kZDOI6fSqIlIbUkmH3hsqZp12T2ahCrIasZxSeXqHqVouDJkSfr3moo_c0EjNBZCWI_KAshheS9nDngdphxdvANwilBlxSL2ktnHX3Ut5icG8BWPyk1E46Y4OpzaCQW_Q9VrdfxqkrgQ55ZwPeBJRqp3dvyrVkvJuBYW_1JYEMOF)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c6084208a1c641a1b3d3350e981f6680&_e=Gkuzjmc8FEuCRZTkasvPIU3mDL4qA_8f_p9XTJ3bMqD1JWdhEorCn0q99lVy-1qrBwSJSn4Erd1_trn6vL2LeaxcI3KYP0alKIJCUBr6JuzsWbU6xBQSQwwsK5vFcbqMX7e0VYLq6k3Vfj0gG-a_FIet-ybz-SKZA6wSlqGUlhOdlwssKPbGqTw51wV1tkQqbu8t2YJkr71sDp6Zojuzsve-Wq2-DeNGgHacV7YduwRaljPrWDzGQc9NW70mKQUdSbpdH38uvdKeXVX6Noz7kTwaq5I-X2YyElEh7Msw1DRSOZqhpxFaiVk5Oha2-WqM2BHG1wJwXtsSOvVrIznJjoc-BTfKQTTDCi2l8BViSKu-VyK2gjwZRnIB8NCgVRKxV0uJ2IyTLMwjyr3sAnEyOlaAj2htnW7JORJ3N34S_IOM2BfpJDUBypKOXA8OX0ze)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c6084208a1c641a1b3d3350e981f6680&_e=Gkuzjmc8FEuCRZTkasvPIU3mDL4qA_8f_p9XTJ3bMqD1JWdhEorCn0q99lVy-1qrBwSJSn4Erd1_trn6vL2LeaxcI3KYP0alKIJCUBr6JuzsWbU6xBQSQwwsK5vFcbqMX7e0VYLq6k3Vfj0gG-a_FIet-ybz-SKZA6wSlqGUlhOdlwssKPbGqTw51wV1tkQqbu8t2YJkr71sDp6Zojuzsve-Wq2-DeNGgHacV7YduwRaljPrWDzGQc9NW70mKQUdSbpdH38uvdKeXVX6Noz7kUoNEH13SW-lVEb6XXPRQv_64IYrm-JYHcwnXmxmHXmDL-rMVlT2RTCs9QCBy_bIdXlX-jgsbtSlAOB2N8x5W0CpmYd6RHJGRtJxHXslSrwDdZQaLr4v0wixiVdoHEXSyM5v7cp-oebDXp7pzwUqZp-bpj7-w9v1_SZytDXZo2Wm).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

body:
It’s time for us to make history and elect Virginia’s first black Congresswoman.

|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56283174/384498271/-1925813607?refcode=dpva-em-221222-mcclellan&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzIwMGZlMy0xMzgyLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=30sTTujQrFlLCS-Nl4usNYzqupBPvVdxMAzYXpIEkHY=) Derek, The 27,900 ballots across Virginia’s fourth congressional district have been tabulated – and the people of VA-04 have decided OVERWHELMINGLY that Sen. Jennifer McClellan is the right choice to continue Congressman McEachin’s legacy and to defeat far-right extremist Leon Benjamin. But we can’t let our foot off the gas – the fight to defeat Leon Benjamin will be a tough one, and Special Elections are notoriously hard to predict. With an evenly divided Congress, we can’t leave this election up to chance! name: Shontel Brown
subject: 2022’s major milestones
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
I spent my first year in Congress working to build a more just and more equitable future.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56284259/384502517/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_221222FirstTerm_N_SB_90DO_G_4_TESTB_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODE0MjMxMC0xODgyLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3S79HvXrZ1YsyA1jYiQz-f1djxK6_vx7JdRbXAeXS-4=) Peter,

When I was sworn into Congress, I vowed to build a more just and more equitable future for Ohioans. I spent my first year in Congress working with our Democratic majority to deliver on that promise.

Together we reached major milestones, _investing more into our infrastructure and green energy than ever in U.S. history, paving the way for student loan forgiveness for more than 1.6 million Ohioans, and putting money back into the pockets of our working-class Americans._

I know we have so much more work to do building an economy that puts working people first, protects the most vulnerable among us, ensures quality education for every child, and upholds our fundamental rights. With my first full term in Congress starting in just a few days, I’m ready to continue fighting for you. But, Peter, I can’t do this alone. To continue fighting for equity and justice for all in Congress, I need you by my side.

[**_So, Peter, whether you’re just joining the team or you’re a long-time supporter, I have to ask, will you join me in the fight for affordable health care, good-paying jobs and benefits, strong public education, common-sense gun violence prevention and so much more by donating just $5 or whatever you can afford today? clean_body: I spent my first year in Congress working to build a more just and more equitable future. = Peter, When I was sworn into Congress, I vowed to build a more just and more equitable future for Ohioans. I spent my first year in Congress working with our Democratic majority to deliver on that promise. Together we reached major milestones, investing more into our infrastructure and green energy than ever in U.S. history, paving the way for student loan forgiveness for more than 1.6 million Ohioans, and putting money back into the pockets of our working-class Americans. I know we have so much more work to do building an economy that puts working people first, protects the most vulnerable among us, ensures quality education for every child, and upholds our fundamental rights. With my first full term in Congress starting in just a few days, I’m ready to continue fighting for you. But, Peter, I can’t do this alone. To continue fighting for equity and justice for all in Congress, I need you by my side. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = I hope you’re with me, = Shontel Brown As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Call Congress Now to Stop the Omnibus
body:
| | |
---
Senator Mike Lee is a national hero, willing to stand up when few if any others are willing to do so. He needs our support now! **Sen. Lee has been fighting to stop the 4,000+ page, nearly $2 trillion omnibus from the start, and he and a few other senators have held the line and are close to pushing the fight to next year for the new Congress - which is where it should be.** Democrats however are willing to shut the government down to maintain the chaos at the southern border. They will not allow any restrictions to the influx of people coming across the border illegally. Majority Leader Chuck Schumer is doing everything he can to stop Mike Lee's amendment on Title 42, which is the only thing that is slowing the influx of illegal immigrants. As if Republican senators didn't have enough reasons to vote against the omnibus, if Schumer is going to kill Lee's amendment and continue the chaos at the border, then ALL Republicans must vote against the omnibus and must vote for a short term continuing resolution that lasts until at least January 5, 2023 when the new Congress can have an honest debate about funding the government. Please call your Senators now and tell them only to vote for a short term continuing resolution so the new Congress can have an honest debate on funding the government. **Call the Capitol switchboard ([202-224-3121](http://lnk.teapartypatriots. "tel:2022243121")) now and ask to speak to your Senators. After you speak with one, call back and ask to speak with the other. **
---
In Liberty, Jenny Beth Martin
---

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: This is all thanks to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Dec2022-FR-December?refcode=E17393-20221201-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Dec2022-FR-December?refcode=E17393-20221201-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25]
Team,

2022 has been a standout year for our democracy, and it’s largely thanks to you. When things got tough, you stepped up to fight for civil liberties, a stronger economy, and affordable, accessible healthcare for everyone.

And all of our hard work truly paid off! Because of supporters like you chipping in when they could throughout this midterm election, we were able to make a huge impact:

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Dec2022-ENG-December?refcode=E19810-20221222-CycleReview-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Dec2022-ENG-December?refcode=E19810-20221222-CycleReview-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5]

I cannot thank you enough for being a part of this team and helping us make a big impact on campaigns across the country this election season.

It’s by making our voices heard that we stopped a red wave in November, and it’s how we’re going to double down our efforts in the years to come to hold the MAGA right accountable and stop them from tearing apart the foundations of our democracy.

See you in the new year.

— Eric

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: The Midwest takes center stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email12222022 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email12222022]
Team,
You heard from my folks earlier this week about the strong midterm turnout in Michigan. I wanted to broaden that scope a bit to discuss how the Midwest is finally on track to have a bigger role in Washington.
After all, the Midwest now represents about 18% (ope!) of the Democratic Caucus.
To ensure we are heard loud and clear, there are a few new things to report that I’m excited about for the 118th Congress, starting January 3.
First, I’m joining the brand new Heartland Caucus to bring more Midwestern pragmatism to Congress. Rep. Debbie Dingell of Michigan launched the group to get all us Midwesterners together to better advocate in the areas of manufacturing, trade and other economic issues that are critical to our region.
Also for the next Congress, my peers elected me to represent Region 3 in our Steering and Policy Committee, which includes Michigan, Minnesota, Wisconsin, Iowa, Nebraska, and the Dakotas. That group guides our party’s work in Congress, and helps Democratic leadership make key decisions.
This means I’m positioned to advocate for more Midwestern representation in the Democratic Caucus and policies that may be overlooked by those from the coasts, but are important to the heartland.
While the party’s top leadership roles will continue to hail from the coasts next term, I’m encouraged by the recent attention we’ve received by the press about being vocal for the Midwest.
And it seems the DNC is listening: They recently moved to make Michigan one of the five early-voting presidential primaries. Nothing is finalized quite yet, but having an earlier primary would mean a much stronger voice in how we choose our presidential candidates and our critical issues would get much more national air time. Plus, it would be great for business as legions of candidates, staff and press will stream into Michigan and get to know our state.
Lastly, I don’t quite have my new committee assignments for the next Congress since assignments won’t be set for a few more weeks — but I’m hoping more Midwesterners, including myself, will continue to have more and more senior roles in the caucus. You’ll see another update from me in January to see where we landed.
For now, I’m proud to represent Region 3 for the Democratic Caucus and look forward to being a voice for the Midwest!
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email12222022]
Elissa

About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. In 2022, she is running to represent Michigan’s newly-drawn 7th district, which covers two-thirds of her existing district. For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game. I'll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most. We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden's radicalism and BREAK the Establishment's stranglehold on this nation. McCarthy won 't fight for us...so we've got to do it ourselves. But we only have a couple weeks before Congress picks our new Speaker. | | | | | | | | | Yours in Freedom, Andy Biggs Republican Congressman, AZ-5 | | | | Paid for by Biggs for Congress Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4f37623a77d44eee95f44f3cec11e13f&_e=Yq-xAMF0xhq9K7cr7jdlZQeNGs-skoYUX2_hTCScJSjEtgeZw7PouQMOsUB4gWCZgLNc368CY4Rd7yrX_iMEWcr0pydKJXlWhEbHBYLldRm6mAmWtUi7ltKDFxIYo8zCUEeHkGRVukh4brDkBzUjHNHOXAP9r577IQR9RZhLJuTHWT7NE5zAq5rewGU9FZNQrfU5u2zRTp37h2oPjjYbsWd5iXOK5m9VAsn9tMzyowKWGM2UJ0AJ6gAHi6G6rfqMaJ6l4p4brsFKyjbZX2Vxu2M0kr6A6VA_Noc1wnxuPy_mYWxzUJ4q0EegvLlH4T58wYESZuUzcxCWFG8pj61e3XNqdOY4x3f6jnmfTg1whCZOp7WGwGq9NluTG5KCIukdz-w4fz9QfX_EezoFr2WV1SsQ9c2eKcetqhMTBC2YmCJ1aPy5CwPlpyt9L8kN-rz8)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4f37623a77d44eee95f44f3cec11e13f&_e=Yq-xAMF0xhq9K7cr7jdlZQeNGs-skoYUX2_hTCScJSjEtgeZw7PouQMOsUB4gWCZgLNc368CY4Rd7yrX_iMEWcr0pydKJXlWhEbHBYLldRm6mAmWtUi7ltKDFxIYo8zCUEeHkGRVukh4brDkBzUjHNHOXAP9r577IQR9RZhLJuTHWT7NE5zAq5rewGU9FZNQrfU5u2zRTp37h2oPjjYbsWd5iXOK5m9VAsn9tMzyowKWGM2UJ0AJ6gAHi6G6rfqMaJ6l4p4brsFKyjbZX2Vxu9XpaZSzxg4rZiWzqnFQCUxCpPt0-BsZqSJW2hpwXzae4nlavwrmORJT3ZxyhetKJLmr4OJRlzHHqYj2dcCF5ghDMjnA2bOy1n08F7PF2wYNozfWnvnhO0goYfEvQdcOSk5DFUY_CaKDzeQXQs6xORivm1Wtdo_u9roYeN52kAsQ)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4f37623a77d44eee95f44f3cec11e13f&_e=Yq-xAMF0xhq9K7cr7jdlZQeNGs-skoYUX2_hTCScJSjEtgeZw7PouQMOsUB4gWCZgLNc368CY4Rd7yrX_iMEWcr0pydKJXlWhEbHBYLldRm6mAmWtUi7ltKDFxIYo8zCUEeHkGRVukh4brDkBzUjHNHOXAP9r577IQR9RZhLJuTHWT7NE5zAq5rewGU9FZNQrfU5u2zRTp37h2oPjjYbsWd5iXOK5m9VAsn9tMzyowKWGM2UJ0AJ6gAHi6G6rfqMaJ6l4p4brsFKyjbZX2Vxuxxqr9IAIbv_Q-f25qRCIagzzRroVS8CT5-1kquc4-ilWvBaat7f2jYWjM17nrZj1M80ynQFJ32_8RxTiuD1CRpydg3sAe5s_51zUxEfUI8s7ZeQtl3OJNNHGRfMLvfb19xIZUAMYGUp8rGgGVU5cmIBvKJlqjm22nfv2LGnuGFU)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4f37623a77d44eee95f44f3cec11e13f&_e=Yq-xAMF0xhq9K7cr7jdlZQeNGs-skoYUX2_hTCScJSjEtgeZw7PouQMOsUB4gWCZgLNc368CY4Rd7yrX_iMEWcr0pydKJXlWhEbHBYLldRm6mAmWtUi7ltKDFxIYo8zCUEeHkGRVukh4brDkBzUjHNHOXAP9r577IQR9RZhLJuTHWT7NE5zAq5rewGU9FZNQrfU5u2zRTp37h2oPjjYbsWd5iXOK5m9VAsn9tMzyowKWGM2UJ0AJ6gAHi6G6rfqMaJ6l4p4brsFKyjbZX2Vxu7FtTjRVO1_dpGpeBqNDrNZJm9-JWy2WylYU9HG4A5OZpX12owRT29f-OaRtELgwRpc4nk-a-PnRjviMtM81B4XV-ZpPwZHrhM-apET3S35YLJe3sfLJNluInu1Xn-dz3LcI2x91ynkKcTXznRz1s9W8GlJ2-vN1fMFDi16vJXJX).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

I can't thank you enough for your hard work over the years and on the January 6 Committee to condemn far-right extremism in our country.

Thanks to the evidence you've revealed, we're one step closer to finally holding Trump and his MAGA traitors accountable for their crimes in the horrific January 6 insurrection.

**I know it isn 't easy standing up to vicious GOP attacks, but your bravery and leadership is _exactly_ what our nation needs right now.** [**So today, I 'm signing this letter and making a donation to VPP to thank you for your heroic efforts and to keep electing incredible leaders like you. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37712?t=8&akid=5900%2E878179%2E0kWYPY) | [DONATE $7 TO SIGN THE LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37712?t=9&akid=5900%2E878179%2E0kWYPY)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Semi=20Bird?=
subject: Christmastime is here!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BIRD FOR GOVENROR**
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=9495a8c4c5&e=fdefed58de)
---
Peter,First of all, **MERRY CHRISTMAS** from Washington State! I hope you are enjoying time with your family and friends. We all have reason to rejoice as we celebrate the real reason for the season: the birth of our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ. It is a joyful time for Christians like ourselves.Beyond Christ’s birth, however, joy for the average American citizen can be hard to find. Statistics like the ones below, should give all Americans pause:Since Biden took office, the average family has lost $5,800 in real annual income.In November, the national average price for a gallon of regular gasoline was $3.68 per gallon, up from $2.42 per gallon prior to Biden’s electionEnergy prices have increased by 18% in the past year.**What does that mean for you? Well, when income is down and fuel and energy prices are up, it means all of us are going to have a rough winter. But you already knew that, didn’t you? I hear from future constituents all over Washington State who tell me they are pinching pennies just to buy a few basic presents for under the tree and ingredients for Christmas cookies.****That’s why I’m running for Governor of this great state!**
| [HELP ME WIN THIS RACE!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=00504ab4d4&e=fdefed58de)
---
The people of this great state are eager for accountability in its leadership, to help bring about positive change for all. We are not just stronger, but far more effective, when we work together as Washingtonians to create actionable solutions.I’m running to replace Jay Inslee in 2024, because he has given up on this great state and the great people who live here. Washington state is typically thought of as a Blue state, but those who live here know better. **With the right Republican running, we can absolutely win. I’m that Republican... and I’m starting early!**
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=26165dbeac&e=fdefed58de)
My mother raised me to have a servant’s heart and from my time in the Army Special Forces, I developed a commitment to preserving our freedom and building a better future for our children. I am a father myself, and I worry every day about the consequences that progressive policies and crippling national debt could have on the lives of young Americans.Currently, Americans are experiencing record-high inflation which threatens families with higher costs to drive their cars and heat their homes, all while the Biden administration spends your tax dollars into oblivion.Friend, we all know that the midterm elections did not produce the “Red Wave” we were all hoping for but it’s not too late for all of us to pitch in and do something about it. Together, Conservatives from all over the country can fight to return power to the people and create a better future for all Americans!Please chip into my campaign today if you want to join in that fight. Any donation, no matter how small, will make a difference! We’re starting early on fundraising and we’re going to have to do this on our own. That’s how I’ve always done it, but trust that I can make a little go a long way.I want to start off 2023 with some STRONG fundraising numbers and secure this nomination - can I count on you to join my campaign today?

| [DONATE $25 TO THE CAMPAIGN!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=362d66e077&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $50 TO THE CAMPAIGN!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=25427a5eef&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $75 TO THE CAMPAIGN!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=7ea6e777bb&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $150 TO THE CAMPAIGN!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=167607ea11&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $350 TO THE CAMPAIGN!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=5df7085025&e=fdefed58de)
---
Thank you and God Bless you,
Semi BirdCandidate for Washington Governor
|

| | Friend, We believe that ALL families in America deserve a wide range of educational choices for their kids, whether they opt for public schools, private schools, charter schools, OR homeschooling. **That 's why we launched the Education Freedom Pledge in the Fall of 2021...** _to rally grassroots supporters of school choice and garner support from legislative figures across the country._ The result? Thousands of everyday Americans and legislators across the country signed the pledge, took a stand for school choice, and made a difference in the school choice movement nationwide. This winter, with so many school choice initiatives once again hanging in the balance in states across the country, **we 're RE-LAUNCHING the Education Freedom Pledge to re-ignite support for SCHOOL CHOICE!** _Will you take a stand for school choice today, Friend?_ **Here is the pledge ...**
---
| | _" I pledge to support policies that promote parental rights in education and educational freedom. This includes the right of parents to voice their opinions at school board meetings and to take their children's taxpayer-funded education dollars to the education providers of their choosing - whether it be a public, private, charter, or home school."_
---

| | Friend, 72% of Americans now support school choice after millions of families saw first-hand during the pandemic that a one-size-fits-all education isn't best for ANY individual child. Unfortunately, the opponents of our movement - the teachers' unions - wield irrational levels of influence on education policy, **and we need your voice.** **If enough grassroots Americans sign the Education Freedom Pledge, we can overcome the teacher's unions and give families the choices they deserve.[_We hope you 'll take a stand today! >>_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b4338064116f4b48a8add9e065697914&_e=-yOwuVnSuRX5P_Cu9IkCyS8HaJWVV-ruOcWEkmXXNAfXVd1EoaZdrcIjiDHTIaNHzVxJfDHzuHjyy3ajaUx0MBn1AoxjB4phdPRBo_AP3Vvuk6XWomS_wTOru0ztStuxPV_MjuZWmyT-k-SUqM-zrZwWJ4im7xnVtjtC1hc_3xbsJt1cEz3Fb0_5jJC7axFhf9MGGf0xCxbkKzColkCvLZg_-A0ROLtXxNNpdRbnsS9oeuIFcAeyU4-tWp1lo6YOQF2bJrsUWXYsKJwH3N1HLwYxhI3tZakFgGAbCqk6SxT8-2cAfokxTnU3GHxKjMbfE6X5UR5na23jMIIWpRMfR-4maBCSSSR0g-ykCXMw1YhObA17PoP4ht7oai-sBdmEI85ridZlAofWQaLx_ftY_wYx5M76xyM5d4lH-_ERnTE%3D)**

This winter, with so many school choice initiatives once again hanging in the balance in states across the country, we 're RE-LAUNCHING the Education Freedom Pledge to re-ignite support for SCHOOL CHOICE! Will you take a stand for school choice today, Friend? Here is the pledge ... | | " I pledge to support policies that promote parental rights in education and educational freedom. This includes the right of parents to voice their opinions at school board meetings and to take their children's taxpayer-funded education dollars to the education providers of their choosing - whether it be a public, private, charter, or home school." | | | | Friend, if you agree that parents deserve CHOICE - and kids deserve better - | | | | When you sign the Education Freedom Pledge, you join a diverse coalition of some of the MOST influential legislators and school choice activists in America. Some of the Education Freedom Pledge 's top signers include... | | Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds AFC Senior Fellow Corey DeAngelis Wisconsin Speaker of the House Robin Vos Florida Education Commissioner Manny Diaz Jr. | | Friend, 72% of Americans now support school choice after millions of families saw first-hand during the pandemic that a one-size-fits-all education isn't best for ANY individual child. Unfortunately, the opponents of our movement - the teachers' unions - wield irrational levels of influence on education policy, and we need your voice. If enough grassroots Americans sign the Education Freedom Pledge, we can overcome the teacher's unions and give families the choices they deserve.** | | | | Thank you, Digital Team American Federation of Children | | | | | | Paid for and Authorized by American Federation for Children | | American Federation for Children 5950 Berkshire Lane, Suite 325 Dallas, TX 75225 | | | | Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Our Campaign Debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
My campaign has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid.
| | |
---
_Hi – I’ll explain more below but our (victorious!) campaign has a little bit of debt to pay off. If you could give just $3 right now to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful. Here’s the link:_ _[**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_email_mw?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56271843/384454606/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mhjtk-2171-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTEwYWFmMC0wMDgyLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kCiCJw3YVJIWicw8lDBIkrCruj6mrEIz1WWRI13OVkQ=)_
|
---
Look – the last few weeks of our campaign were a whirlwind. GOP spending against us skyrocketed, polls tightened, and pundits were doubting whether we could win.

My team put our heads down and focused on making the final advertising investments necessary to get us through the last weeks of the campaign. We were making decisions with the information we had, hoping with all our might that the funding we needed would come through.

Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid.

You’re one of my most important supporters, and I’m hoping that I can count on you to help. **[Will you please give $3 or as much as you can to help us retire our debt? I’d be grateful for anything you can give.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56271845/384454607/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mhjtk-2171-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTEwYWFmMC0wMDgyLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kCiCJw3YVJIWicw8lDBIkrCruj6mrEIz1WWRI13OVkQ=)**

I’m proud of you and our campaign team and the work we did together. Now, we just have to finish this thing off.

Thank you for your help.

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
| | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56271849/384454614/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mhjtk-2171-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTEwYWFmMC0wMDgyLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kCiCJw3YVJIWicw8lDBIkrCruj6mrEIz1WWRI13OVkQ=)

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Happy Holidays!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
We’re so grateful for all of the support you showed to re-elect Mark to the Senate, and we’re so excited to go full speed ahead into the next part of this mission.
So, from Mark, Gabby, and the entire Mark Kelly for Senate team, we wanted to wish you a happy holidays!
[](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/holiday-card-dec22-em/?source=em221222-1-7&akid=4853%2E6688874%2E5avDAR)
Mark and Gabby would love to hear from their supporters ahead of the holidays. If you’d like to sign a card back, you can use the button below.
**[SIGN THE CARD](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/holiday-card-dec22-em/?source=em221222-1-7&akid=4853%2E6688874%2E5avDAR)**
Wishing you a holiday season filled with peace and joy!
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=4853%2E6688874%2E5avDAR).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023?
body:
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a398131f9773486d862a45e6ad86af19&_e=1FsUQ9sDrnJ97r5rdEkNPphtQSlPKhI1RbgbWFU0-sGYkHZzasLoWVnnJSH-R4UcyJoyYSPtQuz29rBATcSx77eYX-iQpqbNYBobFGV4UfyWTvhQvt3YjXrqfib3SJLStuzDo3tret01JEA-7jZRnh6n8eThOd_NBHcxjsEO6AqsnlhwdLvYmQ5_yXbrifNuFvdXmmBBN27PkPN6mt3WXc_D6ZNKzXI2tcIzzZsmeEp8VuRtFSB0MretOQ3XOH-grWR882f0U3p7H2eRBaDeYiwb6XazmbdLZ6YZT899YkuhsjUzmi3w-PJHc_NFDIsLOSr5tGzlZ-2Q0RTM4EnEvAd79icHRq3ys56x_X81lJx86JtcRb5TsQ57PPyONZ5Z)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a398131f9773486d862a45e6ad86af19&_e=1FsUQ9sDrnJ97r5rdEkNPphtQSlPKhI1RbgbWFU0-sGYkHZzasLoWVnnJSH-R4UcyJoyYSPtQuz29rBATcSx77eYX-iQpqbNYBobFGV4UfyWTvhQvt3YjXrqfib3SJLStuzDo3tret01JEA-7jZRnh6n8eThOd_NBHcxjsEO6AqsnlhwdLvYmQ5_yXbrifNuFvdXmmBBN27PkPN6mt3WXc_D6ZNKzXI2tcIzzZsmeEqfxwaJaNTXSSxn8uIg3D6fT2zVYg5bh3iZBbdSqLqti_MJFuH65RjM0VuUx5Gn9KWUXrj6sFwmp7yYBeJAj42HQ68C4UYTe1Fl5Qkl8ctmP75lvXykVpM1LZnk0cXns7D3YJ148ycni23WMg19I6TX)
---
| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a398131f9773486d862a45e6ad86af19&_e=1FsUQ9sDrnJ97r5rdEkNPphtQSlPKhI1RbgbWFU0-sGYkHZzasLoWVnnJSH-R4UcyJoyYSPtQuz29rBATcSx77eYX-iQpqbNYBobFGV4UfyWTvhQvt3YjXrqfib3SJLStuzDo3tret01JEA-7jZRnh6n8eThOd_NBHcxjsEO6AqsnlhwdLvYmQ5_yXbrifNuFvdXmmBBN27PkPN6mt3WXc_D6ZNKzXI2tcIzzZsmeEpbPI_4tTAKzfFJy4nyxqcl56sygoOPjh5kLGsGTalLPUWlphYv877oQkUfXoQb6e5t0MVNShNwz4N9Ezbb74AkWRbJaKmfqvgf5tMDyWVJW6CiOI8zo35x4q7rIXHn1LMaRui3EYbMgUOAqHj_FU7_)

| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We're offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a398131f9773486d862a45e6ad86af19&_e=1FsUQ9sDrnJ97r5rdEkNPphtQSlPKhI1RbgbWFU0-sGYkHZzasLoWVnnJSH-R4UcyJoyYSPtQuz29rBATcSx77eYX-iQpqbNYBobFGV4UfyWTvhQvt3YjXrqfib3SJLStuzDo3tret01JEA-7jZRnh6n8eThOd_NBHcxjsEO6AqsnlhwdLvYmQ5_yXbrifNuFvdXmmBBN27PkPN6mt3WXc_D6ZNKzXI2tcIzzZsmeEqpUnRPpWuwqyFNQ5Nvhh2vbFEcBDRRB2U1uCR3DOMCc5y-22C4RkoQWGhaU1fCiEsVA7j0p2T0vLq6aY950LBd4N1J9tQ8pjzv7KwQXimi75awEjlwp_oIBarF7_xFX_CNjgkNZGE6ichAsdGr108P) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? ## [Add your name: Tell Gaetz and Boebert they are embarrassments to America](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te3452eda-2190-459c-8274-8e30f7bd7c1c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3198875d-2369-4bc3-bcea-77381a192b76/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky risked his life to make the trip to DC to address Congress.

**[But Reps. Matt Gaetz and Lauren Boebert -- two of Trump's biggest fans](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7e30cc97-f2ce-431d-8cb4-676c0ad645a2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) \-- wouldn't even give him their attention, instead ignoring him and conspicuously looking at their phones while he was speaking.** And that was after blowing past security when entering the building. It was their way of trying to appeal to MAGA extremists, who apparently side with Putin, and are fans of fools and their foolish behavior. But real Americans were frankly embarrassed by them--and they need to hear that.

[**Add your name, and tell Gaetz and Boebert they are embarrassments to America**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T667de1e3-6a7e-436c-875a-e9c83223ebc5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _(Already took this action? Forward it to friends so we can maximize the impact! Want to unsubscribe? See link at bottom_

name: Joe Shepherd, URD President
subject: Thank you, Peter, for all of your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
I’m honored to have you on our team | | | Peter, It’s no secret that 2022 was a year full of major triumphs, pitfalls, and setbacks. We witnessed the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ , a rise in antisemitism across the country, and several insurrectionists winning office. Although these events are frustrating, disheartening, and don’t represent our values, **there were numerous successes and victories this year, too.** We saw Democrats step up and provide for the American people like we haven’t seen in a long time. With the passing of the Inflation Reduction Act, the Respect for Marriage Act, the CHIPS Act, and so much more, Democrats really provided for us and set a new standard for the incoming class of Members of Congress. Moreover, **we helped elect five Democratic governors** in Colorado, Kansas, Michigan, Minnesota, and Wisconsin. **We defended battleground districts from flipping red in key Congressional races** in Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Virginia. **We successfully organized grassroots campaigns in rural areas that politicos said were a lost cause**. In North Carolina and Pennsylvania, we prevented far-right leaders from taking office and further sidelining rural Americans. **[And, Peter, we’re just getting started. We’re preparing to do even more in 2023 and beyond. Will you chip in $20 today to help us do even more in the new year?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2GcUc1x4z3oEOBF09xdhGZ1lupCkKMNkctaJkYonHh__XS12mPhoML5EVuhDBCadsEO0eTFdz8NZKe9s4YrX9PGWVL6KqUH6BnAheB8XKjU26QQEkuyOEataWdyxB2UREXPEiPNroUTsJ_NH1wRdjpH0sYC7hqYVUryJcy4bgZlmrF9kEgHRSgXtrC4x3wXHyQi0o-AxYQI2FRXBlwEzkXsw6t3aDNWmSdQZHUFZ2F8wB5k0E7wiW2nWDinwCjCCszhccThEW84_9mLHNXdlIZ-l2E4lBbxekd5DQ1NZqeIHwzx2kEgeBrozhtSKz8GDgwLmruh1m0Lv1dBggq7enPWxB9bl-t_pptGYiuH8d5G62TckEJihDgtDzyNduHwuqP5k5p7D5kQNwqdR8xCgN7_Rw/3s7/it4pfGTQTRW8LbudUiL89w/h0/sQdLYOMYrH9wGr5lY_i5c7vCiLI0nKVL6eiaxHl0zVU)** **[Contribute now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2GcUc1x4z3oEOBF09xdhGZ1lupCkKMNkctaJkYonHh__XTgwIg2uPIDVJOVrsrsyxw6DKHfEXUZ5WiuSRTC89nZ8vTGywNM_k1klHGq1J5N8RQ_OdD4HCYNHKKY380xekCmKBpMurfQrP5o2aM8YBib8ELDZWK_FNI-vYwj-1tqsA0GBUGLxr1-MKEXa-B0CtX6h1hGhn1FXO0D6MJjICb5_LgvuAEf8oi3K1BaMolM4ypCg0pvxsr3RSzB9WQjbabWXicQQFDNLJ2aQma83dIku9SnNyZSJp2giAj3xNxj0LrPRhqKO87ffCHRycUkaGekp2GALOjAZmkMiHYpNy1pZHDFtsTM1Y8lfpLgxujWtB62IZVQepSfUTnV6Bb0UCiHUQlj9k1z7P3SKnDrkQn_tg/3s7/it4pfGTQTRW8LbudUiL89w/h1/UlzAYMJkdoOpdia2Duq3GD5mTJawZmYCLSVaiZfqE8Q)** Thank you, Peter, for your steadfast support and dedication. Because we worked together, we affected great change that will help millions of Americans for years to come. I’m in awe of what we accomplished and I can’t wait for what’s next.
Joe Shepherd, President of United Rural Democrats
---

United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. clean_body: I’m honored to have you on our team | | | Peter, It’s no secret that 2022 was a year full of major triumphs, pitfalls, and setbacks. We witnessed the overturning of Roe v. Wade , a rise in antisemitism across the country, and several insurrectionists winning office. Although these events are frustrating, disheartening, and don’t represent our values, there were numerous successes and victories this year, too. We saw Democrats step up and provide for the American people like we haven’t seen in a long time. With the passing of the Inflation Reduction Act, the Respect for Marriage Act, the CHIPS Act, and so much more, Democrats really provided for us and set a new standard for the incoming class of Members of Congress. Moreover, we helped elect five Democratic governors in Colorado, Kansas, Michigan, Minnesota, and Wisconsin. We defended battleground districts from flipping red in key Congressional races in Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Virginia. We successfully organized grassroots campaigns in rural areas that politicos said were a lost cause. In North Carolina and Pennsylvania, we prevented far-right leaders from taking office and further sidelining rural Americans. Thank you, Peter, for your steadfast support and dedication. Because we worked together, we affected great change that will help millions of Americans for years to come. I’m in awe of what we accomplished and I can’t wait for what’s next. Joe Shepherd, President of United Rural Democrats United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

The Congressional Progressive Caucus stands for everyday working people by passing legislation which will help us build a fair economy, pass universal health care, protect civil rights, and advocate for climate justice.
_**I know that Greg has the values and organizing background to help align our members on votes and goals.**_ With only a slim Republican majority in the U.S. House, we can achieve our economic and civil rights priorities that help working families, but only if we move in unity and solidarity. **Greg is a key part of that coordination effort.**
We need your help to continue organizing both inside the halls of power and also out in the community — from Washington to Texas to DC. This work takes a great amount of resources. disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Will you let Ruben know that you’re in?
#

Peter -
The first poll of the Arizona Senate race is out and one thing is clear: Ruben Gallego running is the BEST chance to keep a Republican out of the seat, and Senator Sinema has no path.
**Public Policy Polling — December 19-20, 2022**
**Two-Way Race:**
Ruben Gallego (D): 48%
Kari Lake (R): 47%
**Two-Way Race:**
Kyrsten Sinema (I): 39%
Kari Lake (R): 42%
**Three-Way Race:**
Ruben Gallego (D): 40%
Kari Lake (R): 41%

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Happy holidays, team!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56297711/384530588/685856095?refcode=fl_email_na_20221222holidays_gv_od90ds_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTE3MWE1OS0zMzgyLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HREOp7jnikgKyv-SigXBTXocQh5CKTL1L7jTXuMAxAE=)
---
Hi friend, As the year winds down and we celebrate the holiday season with friends and family, I wanted to reach out and say how grateful I am for you and your support this past year. Together, we built a movement rooted in people-power to flip New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District and give our communities a true representative of the people in Washington. As your Congressman-elect, I cannot wait to get there and fight for your best interests in 2023. Whether you showed up to an event, knocked on doors, made calls, donated, signed a petition, or spread the word about our campaign to your friends and family — thank you. As we look ahead to 2023 and making more progress for our communities, I want to wish each and every one of you a joyful and peaceful holiday season with your loved ones. From my family to yours, have a very happy and healthy holiday! | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56297712/384530589/685856095?refcode=fl_email_na_20221222holidays_gv_od90ds_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTE3MWE1OS0zMzgyLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HREOp7jnikgKyv-SigXBTXocQh5CKTL1L7jTXuMAxAE=)
---
— Gabe

| Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and immigrant and civil rights to Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico.

clean_body: | = Hi friend, As the year winds down and we celebrate the holiday season with friends and family, I wanted to reach out and say how grateful I am for you and your support this past year. Together, we built a movement rooted in people-power to flip New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District and give our communities a true representative of the people in Washington. As your Congressman-elect, I cannot wait to get there and fight for your best interests in 2023. Whether you showed up to an event, knocked on doors, made calls, donated, signed a petition, or spread the word about our campaign to your friends and family — thank you. As we look ahead to 2023 and making more progress for our communities, I want to wish each and every one of you a joyful and peaceful holiday season with your loved ones. From my family to yours, have a very happy and healthy holiday! | = — Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and immigrant and civil rights to Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Barack Obama
subject: We’re not there yet.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Friend,

Our democracy is resilient, as long as we stay engaged.

We saw that engagement during the last election, when a majority of voters cast their ballots with fair maps -- some for the first time in decades. In Colorado and Michigan, voters passed redistricting reforms. In Pennsylvania, citizens proposed a fair map in court. Across the country, from North Carolina to Kansas, people spoke up in public hearings on behalf of their communities. All of this helped ensure that maps were more fair than before.

But as important as it is to stay engaged around elections, it’s even more important to stay engaged between elections. That’s because the next phase of redistricting is underway and will have consequential impacts on the 2024 elections.

**[Will you make an end-of-year donation to All On The Line? Your support will help them engage voters, mobilize activists, and continue to champion voting rights in 2023.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56297666/384530517/1275189963?refcode=20221222_AOTL_P_BHO_1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBlMjgwZTM5LTMzODItZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rL-UI1d6TvyvjtkbOlaGthb2R6AKB7dNuMT0kWM46xw=)**

Decisions by the U.S. Supreme Court allowed Alabama, Georgia, and Louisiana to hold their 2022 midterm elections with maps that were deemed _illegal_ by lower courts. As a result, millions of voters cast their ballots under gerrymandered maps, some of which violate the Voting Rights Act.

Communities of color were especially impacted by the Supreme Court’s failure to intervene. So while we’ve made progress, we have a lot further to go. We need to continue setting higher standards for the “fairest maps in decades” every time new maps are drawn.

**[Friend, will you make a donation to support All On The Line?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56297675/384530531/1275189963?refcode=20221222_AOTL_P_BHO_1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBlMjgwZTM5LTMzODItZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rL-UI1d6TvyvjtkbOlaGthb2R6AKB7dNuMT0kWM46xw=)**

I am a strong believer that progress doesn’t happen on its own. This movement is proof of that. Whether it was demanding affordable health care or paving the way for federal marriage rights, people like you have always led the way on progress. You’ve kept us marching forward, toward the promise of a better future.

We’re not there yet. But we’re a lot closer thanks to the persistence of voters, activists, and community leaders like you.

Thank you for everything you do,
Barack Obama

**_All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering._**

**Mitch McConnell and Senate RINOs colluded with Chuck Schumer and the Democrats to dump a 4,100-page, 1,700,000,000,000 trillion-dollar socialist spending bill on Congress.**

**McConnell and the rest of the RINOs threw away the GOP winning back the House by pre-emptively surrendering on Joe Biden's socialist spending.**

I won't waive the white flag. I plan to fight.

name: Athena Hollins
subject: Energized
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus DFL House Caucus
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec22?refcode=122222 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec22?refcode=122222]
Friend,
I am so excited about all that DFLers accomplished in 2022 and what this means for Minnesotans. My colleagues have honored me by electing me to serve as Majority Whip in 2023, and despite the short days we have right now I am energized .
I am energized because we have a fantastic group of House DFL members who will work hard for Minnesotans; I am energized because we get to work with a Senate DFL majority to pass legislation; and I am energized because Minnesotans like you care about what happens in this great state.
Friend, our House DFL team needs more than energy to succeed. In order to have staff who work to make sure we are successful in our campaigns, we need help from you. Will you make a donation today so we can keep doing this important work even in a non-election year?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Donate $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec22?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=122222]
Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec22?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=122222]
Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec22?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=122222]
Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec22?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=122222]
Or, another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec22?express_lane_other=true&refcode=122222]
Thank you, friend. We've got a lot of exciting work coming up in 2023, from protecting abortion rights and funding public education to lowering the cost of health care and more. Without the support of DFLers like you this year, we wouldn't be in this position. Thank you for all your support.
Athena Hollins
Majority Whip
Minnesota House DFL
P.S. Don’t forget to use your Political Contribution Refund before the year is out! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec22?refcode=122222]

subject: 👀 Insight into one of the world’sbiggest megaphones for Democratic messaging
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Here at the DNC, we’re meeting folks where they are: online through social media. I wanted to take a moment to highlight some of our great work this cycle. I hope you’ll continue reading. | |
---
I’m Shelby, and I oversee our team of brilliant strategists and content creatives who strive to meet people where they are: _online through social media_. I wanted to take a moment to highlight some of our great work this cycle. In order to feed the internet’s insatiable appetite for content ahead of the midterms, we knew we had to be ready to transform our digital content team into a publishing operation. This cycle, our portfolio included platforms like Facebook, Instagram, Twitter -- and notably, TikTok. The DNC launched a TikTok account this year, becoming the first major U.S. political party to do so. Our team reached young people like never before -- and it paid off. This past November, young voters broke decisively for Democrats, and we elected the first member of Gen-Z to Congress. This massive reach wouldn’t exist without the donations we’ve received -- _and received early_. This work requires the backing of grassroots supporters like you. **[Our team works hard to break through the noise online, and we couldn’t do it without the support of this grassroots team. clean_body: Here at the DNC, we’re meeting folks where they are: online through social media. I wanted to take a moment to highlight some of our great work this cycle. I hope you’ll continue reading. | | I’m Shelby, and I oversee our team of brilliant strategists and content creatives who strive to meet people where they are: online through social media. I wanted to take a moment to highlight some of our great work this cycle. I hope you’ll continue reading, A 2022 Pew Research poll found that half of American adults get at least some of their news from social media, with Facebook and YouTube outpacing other platforms. This shows the massive opportunity Democrats have to directly reach people where they’re spending their time. It’s no secret that our social media accounts have large followings -- on any given day, we can reach an audience of tens of millions of people online with our messages. To put that into perspective, we have one of the world’s biggest megaphones for Democratic messaging , and our success in 2022 is in part because of this grassroots team. This work is critical to amplifying Democrats online, and it requires a huge operation with a lot of resources. I know the holidays are right around the corner, but if you can swing it, will you chip in $7 to power our party? In order to feed the internet’s insatiable appetite for content ahead of the midterms, we knew we had to be ready to transform our digital content team into a publishing operation. This cycle, our portfolio included platforms like Facebook, Instagram, Twitter -- and notably, TikTok. The DNC launched a TikTok account this year, becoming the first major U.S. political party to do so. Our team reached young people like never before -- and it paid off. This past November, young voters broke decisively for Democrats, and we elected the first member of Gen-Z to Congress. This massive reach wouldn’t exist without the donations we’ve received -- and received early. This work requires the backing of grassroots supporters like you. Thank you, and I’ll see you online, Shelby Shelby Cole Deputy Chief Mobilization Officer, Digital Content and Creative Democratic National Committee Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . name: Special Election Updates (via DLCC.org)
subject: These elections could help turn the tide for state Democrats...
body:
We’re less than one month away from the first special election of 2023, with critical races already on the books for January. | | |
---
| | **The clock is racing towards the first special elections of 2023, with critical races already on the books for January.** Securing Democratic victories in these elections won’t be easy. Here’s why:
* Special elections are historically underfunded and rarely receive the attention they deserve – oftentimes, they’re decided by just a _handful_ of votes.
* And after state Democrats’ historic wins this year, state Republicans will be looking for _any_ power-building opportunities they can find.
* **We’ve been outraised by Republicans every quarter this year – so to compete against state Republicans’ outsized spending, we’ll need a tidal wave of support from grassroots Democrats _today._**

We need grassroots Democrats like you to help fuel our on-the-ground strategy, hire organizers, build community relationships, and develop a winning platform for our candidates. **Can we count on you today?** [Rush $7 right now to give state Democrats the support they need to secure victories in elections across the country >>](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xP1bRbO086_ZX-9NTtP6aHeVEwsSwdHrMaTzLu5cuY-dWscWcjyzIwrp-4Q_EBmU0aqxwXxq05dZGXc8HuQX3eHVgDsWYf2rX_tPKSbd6nOPNFLKzSsdg96i-DX4S4X2SIUSysmCbFYo29A0N8ZchS-tPD3PYBn4JskiKQ5g9f9XjnetGoxbbe0t_Xc3DKqWv38LtPqOil0Dl6oKfi18Xen2XJziJH2MOELHuMHmKAMcQrUzmm6NUdyOfTuVcpP7kIq_sWMgYeFpaGZRHlbRA5d-8IOXXfY8SWowXLmRQcueK_AP13rPlepQDYACpjJ44wRkcQoZU-CLkz1uipvqI_QWhkYpOL-Wi_mDfUZ3AQEu9Wu8pK6k4EkAbw46F82v7783lVhgwR0vzmY-k8oeRuA2hTJ1uetdFQ33aW0e7ASx5rfzNTN2HLlBslsf5E2eZCWxQv5f7PQ7cCyS7hLq7ajtDccBxlEPTb0DJ4BgLE8EwLRVzorzPmWrn4CJ70DZc7g8PzQxABLLvgXj-iXBQySyqbKUxt9zej5wvCaIOmrw/3s7/v9GnocHlRv2rWMW0npVeVg/h0/CLi-gK7CSbJZcSlhgliZQtEXP19EwBirVkdTwiQDtJA) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

Democratic majorities aren’t built in a day – or even within a single election cycle. They’re the result of long-term organizing, strategic power-building, and targeted investments – even in the “off” season. **Securing victories in special elections is a key part of our long-term power-building strategy – these elections could help turn the tide for state Democrats.**
That’s why it’s vital that we seize these opportunities and throw our full support behind the incredible Democratic candidates in these elections – we can’t afford to leave anything on the table, so we need your help today.

clean_body: We’re less than one month away from the first special election of 2023, with critical races already on the books for January. | | | | | The clock is racing towards the first special elections of 2023, with critical races already on the books for January. Securing Democratic victories in these elections won’t be easy. Here’s why: Special elections are historically underfunded and rarely receive the attention they deserve – oftentimes, they’re decided by just a handful of votes. And after state Democrats’ historic wins this year, state Republicans will be looking for any power-building opportunities they can find. We’ve been outraised by Republicans every quarter this year – so to compete against state Republicans’ outsized spending, we’ll need a tidal wave of support from grassroots Democrats today. We need grassroots Democrats like you to help fuel our on-the-ground strategy, hire organizers, build community relationships, and develop a winning platform for our candidates. Can we count on you today? | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Democratic majorities aren’t built in a day – or even within a single election cycle. They’re the result of long-term organizing, strategic power-building, and targeted investments – even in the “off” season. Securing victories in special elections is a key part of our long-term power-building strategy – these elections could help turn the tide for state Democrats.** That’s why it’s vital that we seize these opportunities and throw our full support behind the incredible Democratic candidates in these elections – we can’t afford to leave anything on the table, so we need your help today. Thank you, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates. We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states. Our success depends on grassroots donors like you. Ninety-eight percent of our donors give less than $200, and two-thirds give less than $20. To make a contribution, please . name: Jessica Anderson, Heritage Action
subject: How WE beat Nancy Pelosi
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
Heritage Action just led the defeat of a radical piece of legislation that Nancy tried to sneak through. Here’s how.
| | | [](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw9kc1uhCAUhZ9Gdxq9oOjCRdvJdNWkSeMsZjNh4KK0igxiWt--aGeaAMn9zv2BAzZ5yXIGlNI6lg0FnisR6wYygBzCLkhWVGldZPmVV6LOr-SquIxohiPXQ6ocou-1-UInQ7ymYhrjvskoz9lVSSopKYBxlIySkomCcaFEReOh6b23c0SeIjiGJSfDPaY9Ou15h1x4PZmtWdD-gmQak4JVhNUQkePix4vgo-W6MxE5PAQod2EyHo0PXHl5ZyNKvYwBWTfN9g7naXECA9zm7MSj25KQdwMmYXDA-KO9fjT0bsHALmbQMoSm_VjPn_bWmh32WoYnHc5yVPb9xmPXSPuth0HPJQuWdbtlm0Ph5oNWaxOx5whgLwPYzYDFkxNv2ze3JsQOyWtxgm4T4SWcfrX4n3lvku4_sVF2-AVLF5Lc)

| | Friend, Heritage Action recently defeated a radical piece of legislation called the “EAGLE Act” that Nancy Pelosi tried to sneak through right before Christmas _. _ This legislation would have empowered China, hurt American workers, and worsened our current immigration crisis by increasing chain migration.
So how did Heritage Action stop this **BAD BILL **from becoming law? _Inside and outside pressure._

Friend, Heritage Action raised the alarm and the grassroots pressure from our nationwide network of Sentinel activists convinced representatives who initially supported the bill to change their position. In the end, Pelosi pulled the scheduled vote for the EAGLE Act—she knew she didn’t have enough votes to pass it! name: Gabby Giffords
subject: My gratitude for you this holiday season
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
In the spirit of giving this season, I hope you’ll consider making a contribution to Giffords PAC
#

I wanted to take a moment to reach out today and express my gratitude for you during this holiday season.
I feel joy in my heart, and that’s largely because of you. Thank you for all that you’ve done to stand by Giffords and our mission to create a future free from gun violence.
We’re approaching the ten year anniversary of our organization’s founding. If you had told me ten years ago about what we have been able to accomplish—ourselves and as a gun safety movement—I would be astounded. I am so grateful for the way we have grown together.
In the spirit of giving this season, [**I hope you’ll consider making a contribution to Giffords PAC today if you can afford it.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221222-1-15&t=1&akid=2894%2E3935704%2EX3A-u5)
Although we have made so much progress this year in the fight for gun safety, there’s a lot more work to be done. With the challenges that will come along with our newly elected Congress, we will need to make our voices heard loud and clear that gun safety is an issue that our nation cares about.
[**So if you can, it would mean so much to me if you could contribute any amount you can afford to Giffords PAC today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221222-1-15&t=2&akid=2894%2E3935704%2EX3A-u5)
Thank you. I hope you and your loved ones have a joyful and peaceful holiday season.
Sincerely,
Gabby Giffords
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221222-1-15&t=3&akid=2894%2E3935704%2EX3A-u5)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2894%2E3935704%2EX3A-u5) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen
subject: We're going to do more of this in 2023
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
But we'll need your help.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4400?t=2&akid=13170%2E53494%2E4-NF-6) Friend, As we approach the new year, I've been thinking a lot about how grassroots supporters like you make our work possible. None of what we do would be possible without your help, so in the spirit of that partnership, I want to share three of the specific tactics we need your help with in 2023. **Then, I'm going to ask you to chip in. You'll see what your gift could fund below—**[ _**but bottom line, we're doubling down on our 2022 successes and we can't do it without your support.**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4400?t=3&akid=13170%2E53494%2E4-NF-6) | [CHIP IN](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4400?t=4&akid=13170%2E53494%2E4-NF-6)
---
* * *
**2023 Goal: Continue meeting with elected officials and policymakers**
We have laid the groundwork for a big push on state-level climate action and executive action campaigns in 2023. A crucial part of that work is getting our climate policies in front of the right people by having direct meetings with officials and policymakers in the Biden administration and at the state level.
**What we need to accomplish that goal: $$ to keep our policy team leading the climate action conversation**
**2023 Goal: Make more videos**
This year, our best-in-class explainer videos engaged new audiences and inspired viewers to take action by simplifying complex climate topics. A recent example is our Willow Project video, which tallied over 45,000 views and generated over 21,000 petition signatures to President Biden.
**What we need to accomplish that goal: $$ to script, produce, and promote more videos**
**2023 Goal: Continue strategically running ads to the right people at the right times**
In 2022, we used targeted ad campaigns to influence decision-makers and voters at critical moments—like when we ran ads in a pivotal Wisconsin district ahead of midterm elections and helped re-elect climate champion Gov. Tony Evers, or when we blanketed D.C. and Brooklyn (Majority Leader Schumer's neighborhood) with ads demanding climate legislation.
**What we need to accomplish that goal: $$ to create and deploy ads; must be ready for rapid-response situations**
* * *
Friend, now that you're caught up, I'm sure you see why we're hoping you'll chip in to help us start 2023 strong.
Your support funds the successful strategies that have made us one of the most effective climate organizations in the country. It's all part of our mission to advance an all-out mobilization to defeat the climate crisis and create millions of jobs in a just, thriving, and inclusive clean energy economy.
[_**So will you chip in right now to invest in our work and ensure that these successes are only the beginning?**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4400?t=5&akid=13170%2E53494%2E4-NF-6)
[CHIP IN](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4400?t=6&akid=13170%2E53494%2E4-NF-6)
---
Onward,
Jamal Raad
Executive Director, Evergreen

---

Tony Evers, or when we blanketed D.C. and Brooklyn (Majority Leader Schumer's neighborhood) with ads demanding climate legislation. What we need to accomplish that goal: $$ to create and deploy ads; must be ready for rapid-response situations Friend, now that you're caught up, I'm sure you see why we're hoping you'll chip in to help us start 2023 strong. Your support funds the successful strategies that have made us one of the most effective climate organizations in the country. It's all part of our mission to advance an all-out mobilization to defeat the climate crisis and create millions of jobs in a just, thriving, and inclusive clean energy economy. Onward, Jamal Raad Executive Director, Evergreen

C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c1b9de86071e44fb8a7d56591d5a9900&_e=i8md1So7R3dabV_5jnd679oANiNZjyxKKkPQRPRH_sE00Ji48inR30d3Fw7ANB4TwIOTMMHO8pMjAu7gEgjQBIjeL38B8R_oYDd-QbPXGeenfsrKwX-DDqkpwiUyyYVk0bR6VN2ls6py35Z8-bk1CrB1YlhCsTP_A3EijstXgSaT4Xpv9o8pRFaz39Knt_xtCpiEvUfC254tLVE6JuKoi47f42mJn3gc5no8iSKIY2k1aRBPauhZ7RHSPpRCZqEC_bZxb91XlUdm6HEkQB_xVPYci5FlJquWpGaQpH1vJD0hUsWNHlG0a8d6_8vP4yX1dsphl2Jj8dTDLId8tlyEw2QG36fkFwHTWRZiTGkO_zd5PkoohhDc3xsdQ_wKNPBJXDrUk8Q9GI74sT3ngdGXdMtlsSA56x2P2H_9nEpu3gC_nEXRXcCyKD3w4dDClLaf)

| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c1b9de86071e44fb8a7d56591d5a9900&_e=i8md1So7R3dabV_5jnd679oANiNZjyxKKkPQRPRH_sE00Ji48inR30d3Fw7ANB4TwIOTMMHO8pMjAu7gEgjQBIjeL38B8R_oYDd-QbPXGeenfsrKwX-DDqkpwiUyyYVk0bR6VN2ls6py35Z8-bk1CrB1YlhCsTP_A3EijstXgSaT4Xpv9o8pRFaz39Knt_xtCpiEvUfC254tLVE6JuKoi47f42mJn3gc5no8iSKIY2k1aRBPauhZ7RHSPpRCZqEC_bZxb91XlUdm6HEkQB_xVCSqaaYLmljPJXCo1wHsQ4Nb7-WLjOQMvIhpR0GRBc8ffCTz1mlqzdDfeL5fCN4ZchSd87YvhFYt4seqPN3vJgTANX9QSiR97CeZm6jOsJnkUU39UgKLR7PRO67sOtjog1EgA5X7E_0aXCBkUgI1IsqBB_x7pgmQNY8HYQk_s10z)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c1b9de86071e44fb8a7d56591d5a9900&_e=i8md1So7R3dabV_5jnd679oANiNZjyxKKkPQRPRH_sE00Ji48inR30d3Fw7ANB4TwIOTMMHO8pMjAu7gEgjQBIjeL38B8R_oYDd-QbPXGeenfsrKwX-DDqkpwiUyyYVk0bR6VN2ls6py35Z8-bk1CrB1YlhCsTP_A3EijstXgSaT4Xpv9o8pRFaz39Knt_xtCpiEvUfC254tLVE6JuKoi47f42mJn3gc5no8iSKIY2k1aRBPauhZ7RHSPpRCZqEC_bZxb91XlUdm6HEkQB_xVDVZQfuC5vB1Vyij72V7JAuQ6OmZH1nDvJbqfynPSBcoNwlL_3rW-gYRovFoyGfNkriPPe051V40wU0jjrq9g36vZMoLg3ljPHr2x90Sq2ntJ0lWJZQen2ZBg0sUwaGYXBxZg9kX8WnOr1RzXqRWEkNxMvgSPl42Hv-tcRKtsK7Y)
