| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c1b9de86071e44fb8a7d56591d5a9900&_e=i8md1So7R3dabV_5jnd679oANiNZjyxKKkPQRPRH_sE00Ji48inR30d3Fw7ANB4TwIOTMMHO8pMjAu7gEgjQBIjeL38B8R_oYDd-QbPXGeenfsrKwX-DDqkpwiUyyYVk0bR6VN2ls6py35Z8-bk1CrB1YlhCsTP_A3EijstXgSaT4Xpv9o8pRFaz39Knt_xtCpiEvUfC254tLVE6JuKoi47f42mJn3gc5no8iSKIY2k1aRBPauhZ7RHSPpRCZqEC_bZxb91XlUdm6HEkQB_xVHRSLfptkmPsv7TQ-1IrfvpZjppohczDuTBqCB9LU-zxZ9oduji74DSe-MvDMVtAmKh5QJlFJOpKUb5vEiHNgXZN2ZO23GrpXdh9hnMuw8pIhMIrtg4-d3imXw52mb_DPTMy-rQSp4qlPbLWEYldBVtC0XcigxfMxllVgiegC-Wj).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

| Fellow activist, We just want to take the opportunity to wish you the happiest holidays.

We talk a lot about the fight for a better future, but it’s times like these that remind us what we’re fighting for.

No matter what your holidays look like, we hope you’re able to cherish a little love and joy this season.

Happy holidays,

Team NPP [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56299609/384539653/-1069438538?refcode=EM_C_221222Holidays_N_TEAM_90DO_3_NG_N_Signoff&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU2YTU4YmY5LTNkODItZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YKLJUeMUOYZQHyg_QwjKcGWB_6Se5i6DewpV_Tygl7A=) | _The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. clean_body: We’re wishing you the best this holiday season. = | Fellow activist, We just want to take the opportunity to wish you the happiest holidays. We talk a lot about the fight for a better future, but it’s times like these that remind us what we’re fighting for. No matter what your holidays look like, we hope you’re able to cherish a little love and joy this season. Happy holidays, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Special Elections happening 2/7/2023 for three PA House districts in Allegheny Co only, unless otherwise determined: HD32, HD34, HD35 Municipal Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to : May 1, 2023 Last day to : May 9, 2023 Municipal Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. subject: You are needed: Babies at risk
body:
Since Roe v. Wade was overturned, millions of dollars have poured into pro-abortion groups.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zuvs73anjbfs0n24trfn67dseuqkeqlstmv4je9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctgmapb2c3h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uhrr3dbheqrm2ob2e5gm4clh6ko77d35e9qm8sllegpjdctlmjhj0s3m65j32c37q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0sjhcooneddk61p34phmc2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8iv0)

| [ ](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z5oe8j34tku5il9radnreqq102lrg9ovuolol31o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctgmapb2c3h2bs) [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z6tm1b4sih0vbsv0vuo0l88222ainor17rgf9fb0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctgmapb2c3h2bs) [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z9htnm2kafthj72oih5cgrlm4bfvki96712tcmno_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctgmapb2c3h2bs)
---
#
Friend of life,

As someone passionate to end abortion, you need to know what's been going on the last few weeks.

Since Roe v. Wade was overturned, millions of dollars have poured into pro-abortion groups.

Planned Parenthood and NARAL Pro-Choice America saw overall contributions increase from $630,000 to roughly $2.3 million in just three months. Every donation represents another baby in danger of death by abortion.

Meanwhile, pro-life groups accross the country are struggling to keep up as donors have stopped giving. Too many people have viewed the end of Roe v. Wade at the end of the battle, when it is just the beginning.

We need to activate 100 people before midnight tonight so we can stay in the fight and reach 34,000 moms before it's too late. Will you take a stand with us? Give $10 right now:

**[https://give.liveaction.org/stand-up-to-big-abortion/](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z554v52fmngja2ciusvrg5a5ojq8vp8785go0hf0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctgmapb2c3h2bs)**

Friend of Life - this is a David vs. Goliath battle.

We are up against a billion-dollar industry and lobby with the financial backing and support of the elites, the media, Hollywood, and higher education - and Planned Parenthood and its allies are increasing their spending and political action ahead of the mid-term elections.

Why?

Because they want to ensure that Americans reject the Court's ruling on Roe v. Wade and expand abortion nationwide, rather than end it once and for all.

Polls are showing that Americans are increasing in their support of Abortion rights. The 24/7 media barrage funded by committed pro-abortion donors is working and if we don't move quickly, all of our progress the last 40 years may disappear.

We have no time to lose and your gift RIGHT NOW of as little as $10 will save babies from being poisoned, torn apart, and suctioned from their mother's wombs: **[https://give.liveaction.org/stand-up-to-big-abortion/](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ztdcmqjqp9tvq0r573tsrgpmccji3vutis056b4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctgmapb2c3h2bs)**

Your unwavering conviction and commitment to this fight is why I have hope for our future. We will prevail and overcome the horrific injustice of abortion as we spread the truth, one heart and one life at a time.

For life,

**Lila Rose**
Founder and President

[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zd2asfvitqpd85aapdh2o5b9f4lfc9i589ui0e0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctgmapb2c3h2bs)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Conservative FWD, [please use this preferences page](https://e.conservativefwd.com/prefs/9z2zd21p3t862bnpnqsumme37f0m03l5lvenb1vq8b0).
625 First Street #183 Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z4107ppafpdbcpcdaomq3e1vlm8rquv7g18bu3go_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7chjm2pb5c9ge49fg)

| | | Hi Friend, its South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem!

As an unapologetic Conservative, the Fake News media has said a lot about me these last few years, but now I'm ready to set the record straight and tell my story in my own words.

**And that 's why I'm so excited to offer you an exclusive copy of my new memoir _Not My First Rodeo_.** Plus, if you claim your copy today, I'll even sign it, Friend.

But here's the thing -- I am only offering this exclusive opportunity to a very limited number of conservative supporters. So this might be your only chance to claim your very owned signed copy.

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: Their courage mattered
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc
body:
|
---
> _We thought you might want to see this special message from our friends at Republican Accountability PAC._
Friend,

As we approach the end of 2022, I’m saddened to remember that we’re also saying goodbye to two indispensable members of Congress: Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger. Liz and Adam put their careers on the line to do what’s right. Their extraordinary service in voting to impeach Trump, getting to the bottom of the January 6 attack, and challenging other Republicans to face the threats from the MAGA wing of the party was nothing short of courageous. What’s more, they put in the hard work of presenting evidence to the American people—and other Republicans—that Trump is a unique threat to our democracy. [**Liz laid it all out during the January 6 Committee’s hearing on Monday:**](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VVKd4f668zysW7pLJJ19cf8FmW7qxXbD4TVBxWN5yXtlJ3q90_V1-WJV7CgPM1W2SSCkt2DsfdHW5LZ0fT6LtM_XW8Jr3QT6vszqrW7Dy5zT3s2yhnW21Bk2P6RzW_KW7tT0cy8BPxRVW3hR0lF1x72CtW5nyKWy4vbK6kN8Kys5ltlDhmW4bW0ND2jCxWkW6jKKdJ8-qGtFW25jwfj976M2MW3ql_056wNZdVVJXHQJ5cx8hXW2ZT9vP3SCLHZW6z1PJR3BCdLvW1NYK_-5gFqFFW8ZLyW74XNHkKN6DqwW_-XZHQW3-1g4v6l9CmRW66bc-W5dmQl4W3WFtrq5NVR6SW7kC_-n1lN1r-W49LKfp5RCzM5W8YvHBD9m0L-hW69mZkp8lr6StW8kPhQj2sthWxW4ffWLP5NvN9QW4sH0cC3d0qZSW8hWPCk8v-8dn391Z1)
---
[ ](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VVKd4f668zysW7pLJJ19cf8FmW7qxXbD4TVBxWN5yXtlJ3q90_V1-WJV7CgL3VW8t9_TM98MyXgW4VhJ5q5dpk0nW6tPmzz9by8W4W7prRQL1Yj0JkW5SyW6X34Sz07VZpp534hT7zhW48Jgj3259TkdW6_flkv99wfD6N8xDc1hP_dglW6FGw4j20_CV9VhrxYH2-rL7WW21qd2781mkTPW5VnPSh94SWHmW4fGt851gyWFFVQpRnl8w4ntWW5ZC5Xn5FQMWkW59NYMN8FLCmrW3QqzW25pRbLxW73h_Pr5Lh58wW73FmFL9lGmrHVCp2qG8-mzlFVtQBPx82-8ZXW7x0TXs7lq9lQVwvr7X98f3z0W6124ZV21wwFHW8Wxfkp979JnPW1BFnSY8hWN94W28htZX4-xPpvW82rtVp2VHffmW8NtgMz7CPfV43mw71)
---
Though some in the GOP shunned Liz and Adam rather than confront the facts, millions of Americans—including many Republicans—supported their honesty and admired their bravery.
##
**So join me in thanking Liz and Adam for putting country over party.** They’re going to keep up the fight outside of Congress, and I know they can count on all of us to be right there with them.
##
Sarah Longwell Treasurer, Republican Accountability PAC

clean_body: | We thought you might want to see this special message from our friends at Republican Accountability PAC. Friend, As we approach the end of 2022, I’m saddened to remember that we’re also saying goodbye to two indispensable members of Congress: Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger. Liz and Adam put their careers on the line to do what’s right. Their extraordinary service in voting to impeach Trump, getting to the bottom of the January 6 attack, and challenging other Republicans to face the threats from the MAGA wing of the party was nothing short of courageous. What’s more, they put in the hard work of presenting evidence to the American people—and other Republicans—that Trump is a unique threat to our democracy. Though some in the GOP shunned Liz and Adam rather than confront the facts, millions of Americans—including many Republicans—supported their honesty and admired their bravery. So join me in thanking Liz and Adam for putting country over party. They’re going to keep up the fight outside of Congress, and I know they can count on all of us to be right there with them. Sarah Longwell Treasurer, Republican Accountability PAC | Republican Accountability Project, 925 15th Street NW, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Friend, Human trafficking can occur anytime, anywhere, oftentimes in plain sight. Sadly, it _[**recently happened**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=6422197e7a744d85a086f06146724e63&_e=Yo8gF4Oo4QFoW9-BERTXkTjFo8lWkFKZ8l5wVxduCIyIK36D6RK_nri7c--tppUXUj6NjmJ86hj_IHr9C18Mrw2QG9dSFFl1xlg67BiwYKEqArQJ14BNj0so5nFN7fmfSBwl9b4aqWzIvPyftCY_dIHFsmqFuVrcnfdh4TZkVxoYFVhEOdMAg91VLIVzUqhx-kPrfMDA4H-Sj24swNRfObX-wpht5FOptq3u1nlUcc29FZq0PcxJm4S8wEbNTvNgLbckko6GB3MxlO1rt8Cu-V9VVMZKyAG_Dtwvf15kiu7ISdETOcRvGRQUZSKIY-lQM_qaIQRr4Yv-IaTMzmG_442yKcgCAtf98XNYKbZf3Kc%3D)_ in our own backyard.
---
[](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=6422197e7a744d85a086f06146724e63&_e=Yo8gF4Oo4QFoW9-BERTXkTjFo8lWkFKZ8l5wVxduCIyIK36D6RK_nri7c--tppUXUj6NjmJ86hj_IHr9C18Mrw2QG9dSFFl1xlg67BiwYKEqArQJ14BNj0so5nFN7fmfSBwl9b4aqWzIvPyftCY_dIHFsmqFuVrcnfdh4TZkVxoYFVhEOdMAg91VLIVzUqhx-kPrfMDA4H-Sj24swNRfOaXvd6WQumSmFJwQp4ZOfLQsDIrWdNFAVC7IzVU0qJVwG6ymzbY6q3q5vIY5_DDnPHyUNrtj7s6VeJsjQqXBhTk_-I7bZ244lpwcD4ogp6utB94owp2h1d8oN3Ek59W2ot6Z5HaIfRjmOUpiBZX1NJU%3D)

| | I’m incredibly proud of the work the Homeland Security Investigations Norfolk and our Hampton Roads Human Trafficking Task Force did in this case. We’re on the path that will provide justice for the victims. But this brings about an overarching issue, friend. **If Congress continues to refuse to secure the border and address the human trafficking and drug crisis taking place, attorneys general are the last line of defense against lawlessness in their state. **[**I AGREE >>**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=6422197e7a744d85a086f06146724e63&_e=Yo8gF4Oo4QFoW9-BERTXkTjFo8lWkFKZ8l5wVxduCIyIK36D6RK_nri7c--tppUXUj6NjmJ86hj_IHr9C18MrwHUKfKNWt2ldpWEfStjSVsAEguGgTQfG9GvrRpfmP2wuQUUykxpIJUmtnJpiuDf7VPqlk9sxdMHdi7LaPqHUauI3eZfnkJd6FUBT3TT4NR_mRtiff3MZXA0UcC53t-pAKV9jyu0ydgShKffagQ8q0o7ndgsn_zfX-vmnyEd6Uw5O4r3b0YB8KD_pcwgTmrpy7I4G43PWMPFrjAo5tnMcCczuS845PcMs3qMOhrDduO86_wGZI4IixhfUDlVv9264TdDX-YnGadqaEwEOexZA6U%3D) Sign the petition now if you want to see attorneys general stand up and protect citizens in their state: **[https://secure.winred.com/miyares-for-virginia/action-5793470](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=6422197e7a744d85a086f06146724e63&_e=Yo8gF4Oo4QFoW9-BERTXkTjFo8lWkFKZ8l5wVxduCIyIK36D6RK_nri7c--tppUXUj6NjmJ86hj_IHr9C18MrwHUKfKNWt2ldpWEfStjSVsAEguGgTQfG9GvrRpfmP2wuQUUykxpIJUmtnJpiuDf7VPqlk9sxdMHdi7LaPqHUauI3eZfnkJd6FUBT3TT4NR_mRtiff3MZXA0UcC53t-pAEEAKkmtJVfCFsLEnnJNGSI-yKHk0_11wodDgKR_8GNgAtt3JV3T9A1SD3hdWZLzWeEwPTV88AxrNRb2RAuUNvma2LjC7GFi99QF6m9vtmlhfaJY1Go9biPYT15Lws2H8ECYyuScN7IniRxJE34puew%3D)**

subject: We Shut Down a Transgender Clinic
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Friends,

We just scored a big victory for parents and children! The South Carolina Freedom Caucus recently exposed a local hospital for providing transgender services to kids as young as 4 years old.

**Due to the SC Freedom Caucus's unrelenting pressure, the hospital decided to shut down their pediatric transgender unit!**

The Network's South Carolina Director, Evan Newman, and the principled men and women of the SC Freedom Caucus deserve a ton of credit for their efforts. We also want to give thanks to Tom Jones and his team at the [American Accountability Foundation](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=781ee6a6e8&e=64ecec6d03). His opposition research into the hospital's practices helped the SC Freedom Caucus engage on the issue.

The best part of this whole saga is that we now have the blueprint to do it in other states! That's how the Network operates - we find out what works and then we help ALL of our state freedom caucuses implement the strategies.

The victory has been reported in media outlets nationwide, but below is the full Breitbart story.

**But before you read the story, please help us continue to support these brave members of the various state freedom caucuses.**

**For just $10 a month, you can support the State Freedom Caucus Network as it works to fight big government and secure liberty at the state level.

Click **[here](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=5b0255cfd5&e=64ecec6d03)** to set up your recurring monthly donation now. Even $25 or $50 will make a huge difference.**

**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
**President**
**State Freedom Caucus Network**

P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation’s state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a [contribution here](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=4e563e4329&e=64ecec6d03) and join us as together we work to advance the cause of liberty.

*****************

[https://www.breitbart.com/health/2022/12/19/south-carolina-freedom-caucus-forces-pediatric-trans-clinic-shut-down/](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=639031e78a&e=64ecec6d03)

**South Carolina Freedom Caucus Forces Pediatric Trans Clinic to Shut Down** A pediatric transgender clinic has ceased operations after the South Carolina Freedom Caucus (SCFC) submitted a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request and proposed legislation combatting sex-change surgeries. The Medical University of South Carolina pediatric transgender clinic notified the SCFC that they will no longer be engaging in “pediatric/adolescent transgender hormonal care.” “Officials from MUSC have informed us that they will no longer be providing morally and ethically repugnant ‘gender affirming care’ that results in irreparable harm for minors,” SCFC Chairman Adam Morgan (R-Greenville) stated in a press release. He also remarked that “This is a huge win for the Freedom Caucus. But more importantly, it is a huge win for childhood innocence.” The SCFC submitted FOIA requests for medical records after the American Accountability Foundation tweeted an excerpt from a research report explaining that children as young as 4 years old had visited the center for “treatment.” The document also noted that 62 percent of children who visited the clinic had received puberty blockers or hormone therapy. The SCFC also announced their plans to pursue legislation that would ban sex change surgeries for those under the age of 18 in a press conference alongside Congressman Ralph Norman, doctors, nurses, and parents. [](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=99040afd32&e=64ecec6d03) _U.S. Rep. Ralph Norman, R-S.C., speaks at an announcement of the creation of a new South Carolina Freedom Caucus based on a similar national group at a news conference on Wednesday, April 20, 2022 in Columbia, S.C. (AP Photo/Jeffrey Collins)_ MUSC responded to the SCFC’s record request while also adding that the university “no longer provides pediatric/adolescent transgender hormonal care.” Family medicine physician Don Millus voiced support for the SCFC, saying “I applaud the Freedom Caucus for leading the call to stop medical and surgical transgender interventions in pediatric patients in South Carolina that lead to irreversible changes for our children.” Meanwhile, MUSC declined to provide the entirety of a study called “Growth of the gender dysphoric transgender population in the MUSC Pediatric Endocrinology Clinic.” Findings suggest that those within MUSC have taken steps to dodge public records requests. In one email exchange, a redacted sender encourages redacted recipients to contact Chase Glenn, MUSC’s Director of LGBTQ+ Health Service, via his personal email for more “privacy.” SCFC Secretary Josiah Magnuson (R-Spartanburg) noted that while the caucus was “successful in making MUSC stop their medical sexualization of our children,” they’ve also found that “the university has been infiltrated by extremists who encourage the circumvention of FOIA laws.” He added “the battle against the woke Left in South Carolina is just getting started,” before noting “State institutions like MUSC can’t be allowed to keep hiding their taxpayer-funded activities from the public. It’s time our colleagues get on board with the Freedom Caucus in our efforts to clean up these rogue institutions and agencies.” Meanwhile, SCFC member Stewart Jones (R-Laurens) prefiled the “Vulnerable Child Protection Act.” The act would make it illegal to provide puberty blockers or perform sex change operations on those under the age of 18 in South Carolina. Jones spoke to the necessity of the legislation, remarking, “We have a moral, ethical, and legislative duty to protect children from leftist doctors and pharmaceutical companies who use our kids as guinea pigs for profit and to promote their radical agenda.” Should the bill pass, South Carolina will become the latest on a growing list of states that have taken legislative action to defend children from medical interventions that seek to change their sex. The Florida Board of Medicine and the state Board of Osteopathic Medicine recently [voted](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=d0b2132997&e=64ecec6d03) to ban puberty blockers and sex change operations for minors. Meanwhile, the House and Senate Majority Leaders in Tennessee have [introduced](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=02f3d3b859&e=64ecec6d03) a bill that would also ban puberty blockers and sex change operations for minors. **_Spencer Lindquist is a reporter for Breitbart News. Follow him on Twitter _**[**_@SpencerLndqst_**](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=c7a9adf986&e=64ecec6d03)** _ and reach out at _****_slindquist@breitbart.com_**

clean_body: | | | | | | | Friends, We just scored a big victory for parents and children! The South Carolina Freedom Caucus recently exposed a local hospital for providing transgender services to kids as young as 4 years old. Due to the SC Freedom Caucus's unrelenting pressure, the hospital decided to shut down their pediatric transgender unit! The Network's South Carolina Director, Evan Newman, and the principled men and women of the SC Freedom Caucus deserve a ton of credit for their efforts. We also want to give thanks to Tom Jones and his team at the . His opposition research into the hospital's practices helped the SC Freedom Caucus engage on the issue. The best part of this whole saga is that we now have the blueprint to do it in other states! That's how the Network operates - we find out what works and then we help ALL of our state freedom caucuses implement the strategies. The victory has been reported in media outlets nationwide, but below is the full Breitbart story. But before you read the story, please help us continue to support these brave members of the various state freedom caucuses. For just $10 a month, you can support the State Freedom Caucus Network as it works to fight big government and secure liberty at the state level. Click to set up your recurring monthly donation now. Even $25 or $50 will make a huge difference. Keep fighting, Andy Roth President State Freedom Caucus Network P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation’s state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a and join us as together we work to advance the cause of liberty. South Carolina Freedom Caucus Forces Pediatric Trans Clinic to Shut Down A pediatric transgender clinic has ceased operations after the South Carolina Freedom Caucus (SCFC) submitted a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request and proposed legislation combatting sex-change surgeries. The Medical University of South Carolina pediatric transgender clinic notified the SCFC that they will no longer be engaging in “pediatric/adolescent transgender hormonal care.” “Officials from MUSC have informed us that they will no longer be providing morally and ethically repugnant ‘gender affirming care’ that results in irreparable harm for minors,” SCFC Chairman Adam Morgan (R-Greenville) stated in a press release. He also remarked that “This is a huge win for the Freedom Caucus. But more importantly, it is a huge win for childhood innocence.” The SCFC submitted FOIA requests for medical records after the American Accountability Foundation tweeted an excerpt from a research report explaining that children as young as 4 years old had visited the center for “treatment.” The document also noted that 62 percent of children who visited the clinic had received puberty blockers or hormone therapy. The SCFC also announced their plans to pursue legislation that would ban sex change surgeries for those under the age of 18 in a press conference alongside Congressman Ralph Norman, doctors, nurses, and parents. U.S. Rep. Ralph Norman, R-S.C., speaks at an announcement of the creation of a new South Carolina Freedom Caucus based on a similar national group at a news conference on Wednesday, April 20, 2022 in Columbia, S.C. (AP Photo/Jeffrey Collins) MUSC responded to the SCFC’s record request while also adding that the university “no longer provides pediatric/adolescent transgender hormonal care.” Family medicine physician Don Millus voiced support for the SCFC, saying “I applaud the Freedom Caucus for leading the call to stop medical and surgical transgender interventions in pediatric patients in South Carolina that lead to irreversible changes for our children.” Meanwhile, MUSC declined to provide the entirety of a study called “Growth of the gender dysphoric transgender population in the MUSC Pediatric Endocrinology Clinic.” Findings suggest that those within MUSC have taken steps to dodge public records requests. In one email exchange, a redacted sender encourages redacted recipients to contact Chase Glenn, MUSC’s Director of LGBTQ+ Health Service, via his personal email for more “privacy.” SCFC Secretary Josiah Magnuson (R-Spartanburg) noted that while the caucus was “successful in making MUSC stop their medical sexualization of our children,” they’ve also found that “the university has been infiltrated by extremists who encourage the circumvention of FOIA laws.” He added “the battle against the woke Left in South Carolina is just getting started,” before noting “State institutions like MUSC can’t be allowed to keep hiding their taxpayer-funded activities from the public. It’s time our colleagues get on board with the Freedom Caucus in our efforts to clean up these rogue institutions and agencies.” Meanwhile, SCFC member Stewart Jones (R-Laurens) prefiled the “Vulnerable Child Protection Act.” The act would make it illegal to provide puberty blockers or perform sex change operations on those under the age of 18 in South Carolina. Jones spoke to the necessity of the legislation, remarking, “We have a moral, ethical, and legislative duty to protect children from leftist doctors and pharmaceutical companies who use our kids as guinea pigs for profit and to promote their radical agenda.” Should the bill pass, South Carolina will become the latest on a growing list of states that have taken legislative action to defend children from medical interventions that seek to change their sex. The Florida Board of Medicine and the state Board of Osteopathic Medicine recently to ban puberty blockers and sex change operations for minors. Meanwhile, the House and Senate Majority Leaders in Tennessee have a bill that would also ban puberty blockers and sex change operations for minors. Spencer Lindquist is a reporter for Breitbart News. Follow him on Twitter and reach out at **slindquist@breitbart.com | "CLICK HERE TO DONATE" | Photos: PennLive - Dan Gleiter. November 28, 2022. | | | | | Copyright © 2022 State Freedom Caucus Network, All rights reserved.

body:
Wishing you a safe and joyful holiday season.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221222-3730-header&t=1&akid=3730%2E2526796%2EMk9pAq)
Happy holidays!
We just wanted to drop a quick note.
From all of us, to all of you: Happy Hannukah 🕎 , Merry Christmas 🎄, Blessed Kwanzaa , Happy Holidays, and Happy New Year 🥂!
Thank you for being part of this community. We feel so lucky to celebrate this season with you.
Warm wishes,
Team AOC

subject: A huge victory for New Mexico’s children, families, and educators
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
We can continue our work to lift up children and families — but we need the resources to do it. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56301824/384549164/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221222_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzUyNmZkYy01MjgyLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K0cBxW2f3KzUfXfKmRmPFjzOAUlQ-rJzYITUQy1iFjM=&emci=40bcd4a5-4082-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=73526fdc-5282-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=252045)
---
It’s official, folks — the United States Senate has authorized New Mexico’s constitutional amendment to invest in early childhood education and K-12 schools! New Mexican lawmakers, advocates, and — most importantly — voters across our state have worked for more than a decade to secure this investment in our kids, families, and educators. I am proud to have been a part of this work and, now, to have led New Mexico’s Democratic congressional delegation to get this critical legislation passed in the Senate. Next, this bill heads to the House of Representatives, and then President Biden! Very soon, New Mexican families will finally have access to universal early childhood education and care, students in need will have support to reach their full potential, and we will see more investments in our educators and students at every grade level. _All without raising taxes on hardworking folks._ We can continue our work to lift up children and families — but we need the resources to keep champions for education and families in Congress and our state legislature. [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ze90iug0up1j301k711p6sgrkm73o12v6fkgusg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctimcor2cdh2bs) | #### [ Title 42 Fight Stalls Omnibus Bill Passage of the $1.7 billion omnibus spending bill stalled on the Senate floor Wednesday night when lawmakers went head-to-head over Title 42. Hoping to pass the bill Wednesday night, Senate Democrats agreed to hold votes on amendments to the spending package if Republican Senators would allow an earlier vote on the bill. The process stalled [...] READ MORE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zot4cvroisp5mg4cjbknm9ft3uau9ocu0ot11c58_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctimcor2cdh2bs)

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zglefe6ccq9v83hfiqb16t7em24f8mm4opr5qbug_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf8jmemj72sjkm1qj791lmkp79dhk6ep34t5l6cqb7dpjkorrbdt6e5p79c3l6uh7ac9km9qjccbnsor7fl9lmgqb3df161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4or7fljhe9qb0t9km4qu8oj5cphmeop66prtfcpj6pqj2tf0ccj3ctul6po7bpdk6ioredbjm8gq48bi4bh28or7chjmapj3c9hm49fg)

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zidd8d8fma7ngol90oum6qafvklbq8lkbjvormng_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctimcor2cdh2bs)
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmfc5qee37j1i74krv97o9p3qrcv91d3t6m4p1eg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctimcor2cdh2bs) | #### [ The Republican Reaction To Biden-Zelenskyy Joint Press Conference President Biden hosted a joint press conference with Ukraine President Volodymyr Zelenskyy Wednesday. During this Biden reaffirmed that the U.S. will continue with the commitment to provide aid to Ukraine to help them maintain their national sovereignty. Though some Conservatives argue that the United States has already provided enough aid to the county. Arguing that our limited resources should instead be directed to American citizens. Leading up to and following Biden’s joint press conference, many Conservative lawmakers and activists had a response to both Presidents. All echoed the same sentiment, that the United States should stop sending money to Ukraine. According to Fox Weather, the blizzard is set to move across the Midwest and the Great Lakes region this week before becoming a bomb cyclone. As the storm moved to the East Coast, it is expected to usher in cold temperatures and freeze heavy rainfall.Meteorologists have begun to refer to the term bombogenesis, to describe the situation. As the term is a combination of the words bomb and cyclogenesis. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. name: Kevin Hern (personal)
subject: Wishing you a wonderful Christmas
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
🎄 I hope you enjoy a great holiday season with your loved ones!
| | | Peter,

I wanted to drop a quick note today to wish you and your loved ones all the best during this Christmas season. My wife Tammy and I also wanted to share our 2022 Hern Family Christmas card with you!
---
---
During this special time of year, we can reflect on the birth of our Lord and take time to enjoy a wonderful season full of family, food, gifts, and fellowship.

Thank you again for all of your great support in 2022. I hope you and yours have a very Merry Christmas this year!
Sincerely, Kevin Hern
---

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43434%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6rZmVo4jxEraxtRh1ZUHqA&sysid=1

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43445%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qp%2fqN%2fQDrNQLFopO9jG2tg&sysid=1 BREAKING: Major Decision Made On Kari Lake’s Election Lawsuit

Maricopa County Superior Judge Peter Thompson ruled that two of Kari Lake’s 10 different claims can go to trial. The claims allowed by Judge Thompson involve the breakdowns/malfunctioning of printers, along with Election Day and ballot chain of custody issues. Lake’s lawsuit alleged that between 15,603 and 29,257 Republicans were disenfranchised who would have likely voted for Lake, according to a calculation performed by data analyst Richard Baris of Big Data Poll who surveyed voters about whether they experienced problems on Election Day.

Read more https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43445%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qp%2fqN%2fQDrNQLFopO9jG2tg&sysid=1

Peter, __ Today the Daily Beast revealed the contents of a 37-page guide for aides who set the schedule for and staff Senator Kyrsten Sinema during her workdays in Washington and Arizona. A possible violation of Senate ethics rules, aides to Sinema were expected to get her groceries, fix her internet, and ensure her very specific preferences for airline seats, room-temperature water, and Olympic-sized swimming pools were upheld, _or else_. The memo also revealed that Sinema limited meetings with constituents to THREE minutes during a 30-minute block on Wednesdays. Of course meetings with lobbyists and donors got allotted several hours a week – along with her much needed weekly massages. subject: re: the Senate filibuster

body:
Peter, should we keep the filibuster???

| **ONE:** The filibuster is a Senate rule that requires a supermajority to pass legislation. _Republicans have used it to block progress on issues such as voting and civil rights!_

**TWO:** President Biden is renewing his push for an assault weapons ban... but the bill stands little chance of breaking the Senate filibuster.

**THREE:** The Senate just passed a bill protecting same-sex and interracial marriage... _after a filibuster was defeated!_

**Here’s the bottom line: The Senate filibuster rule has led to legislative gridlock.**

[**_So Peter, we need to know by midnight:
DO YOU SUPPORT ABOLISHING THE FILIBUSTER? »_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56296861/384525037/-2064944384?refcode=UD_20221222_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRiMjZlZjBhLTJmODItZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Pg5unwOQ6vHb86cCjdKi8ElNI_So2Tnm_BbFDiMpsOk=&emci=a0272fce-4681-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=db26ef0a-2f82-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=4584036) | **[YES »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56296862/384525038/-2064944384?refcode=UD_20221222_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRiMjZlZjBhLTJmODItZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Pg5unwOQ6vHb86cCjdKi8ElNI_So2Tnm_BbFDiMpsOk=&emci=a0272fce-4681-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=db26ef0a-2f82-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=4584036)**

| | The election year is behind us and a new Congress will be seated in early January. But before the year is out, we're still busy in the nation's capitol, and I thought I'd share with you a brief update. **Last week, President Biden signed the Respect for Marriage Act into law.** This law ensures that marriages performed in any state are respected in every state and by the federal government, guaranteeing marriage equality for LGBTQ+ and interracial couples across the country. While the Supreme Court has previously guaranteed a constitutional right to same-sex marriage in _Obergefell_ and interracial marriage in _Loving_ , the decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ taught us that precedents may not be respected with the new right-wing Supreme Court majority. So, Congress took action to defend marriage rights in federal law. Of course, I won't stop fighting until the Equality Act is law too, protecting LGBTQ+ Americans from discrimination in every walk of life, including housing, places of accommodations, financial contracts and jury duty. **This week, we saw the final report from the January 6th Committee** , making criminal referrals for Donald Trump, Mark Meadows, Rudy Giuliani, and others. The violent insurrection and attempted coup on that terrible day demands accountability. It also demands that we take action to ensure it never happens again. **This week, we will pass the Electoral Count Reform Act on a bipartisan basis as part of the year-end funding deal.** This law will protect the popular vote, raise the threshold for objections to the electoral college votes, and clarify that the Vice President's role is a ceremonial one. By passing this law, we'll close ambiguities in the law that Donald Trump attempted to exploit on January 6, 2021. And with the PUMP Act, a high priority of mine, we're extending and protecting the rights of nursing mothers to have a safe and clean place to pump at work. Finally, as we close out the year, we're investing in more funding for the National Labor Relations Board so they can hire more staff and ensure that unions can organize without interference, increases to the Pell Grant, and a 30% increase for child care funding. These accomplishments are the product of lots of hard work both inside and outside the halls of Congress. Nothing that happens on Capitol Hill is possible without the grassroots work of millions of people like you insisting on change and progress. Thank you for your partnership this year and always! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | subject: BREAKING: Trump’s approval rating hits an all-time LOW

body:
| | | **BREAKING via FiveThirtyEight: Trump’s approval rating hits its LOWEST point since he left office!**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/11065?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221222-LivePoll-TrumpLowestEverFavorability-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221222-LivePoll-TrumpLowestEverFavorability-ETG-sl1&akid=9295%2E9716520%2Etym97q)
_But with Trump still mounting his comeback campaign for president, we need to know where top Democrats stand:_

**Do you approve of Donald Trump?**
| | | [NO](https://go.dscc.org/go/11065?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221222-LivePoll-TrumpLowestEverFavorability-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221222-LivePoll-TrumpLowestEverFavorability-ETG-sl1&akid=9295%2E9716520%2Etym97q)
---
| [YES](https://go.dscc.org/go/11065?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221222-LivePoll-TrumpLowestEverFavorability-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221222-LivePoll-TrumpLowestEverFavorability-ETG-sl1&akid=9295%2E9716520%2Etym97q)
---

Team, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight reports that Trump’s favorability rating has just hit a new **ALL-TIME LOW** since he left office!

But that's not stopping him from running for president AGAIN -- **and we can’t take any chances: Another Trump presidency would be a _disaster_ for the nation!**

We’ve launched an urgent Live Poll to find out if Democrats are ready to stop Trump's comeback -- _but we’re still 47 responses short in Pennsylvania!_ **So please, before midnight:**

**Do you approve of Donald Trump?**
| | [NO](https://go.dscc.org/go/11065?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221222-LivePoll-TrumpLowestEverFavorability-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221222-LivePoll-TrumpLowestEverFavorability-ETG-sl1&akid=9295%2E9716520%2Etym97q)
---
| [YES](https://go.dscc.org/go/11065?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221222-LivePoll-TrumpLowestEverFavorability-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221222-LivePoll-TrumpLowestEverFavorability-ETG-sl1&akid=9295%2E9716520%2Etym97q)
---

Thanks,

Team DSCC

name: Madeleine Foote, LCV
subject: YOUR SIGNATURE NEEDED: Support President Biden cutting methane pollution. [GOAL: 35,000 actions]
body:
Add your name today. |
---
| | **
TELL PRESIDENT BIDEN:
CUT BIG OIL'S METHANE POLLUTION **
The Biden administration has proposed a rule to cut methane and other harmful pollutants from oil and gas operations. This new proposal from the EPA moves us in the right direction -- but we know the fossil fuel industry would rather protect their profits instead of our communities and climate and will push back hard.

President Biden needs to hear from the environmental movement that we support this rule. [We're aiming to deliver 35,000 signatures _today_ -- can you help us get there?](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/pNy7f7dYAAC~/V1hWZTRTNk9qaUI4bmRQNUlPU0REMmZkSkFqMjBJZXphUlZZU21LRzRUNHIyekVFUzVPQVM1dUJEbDhPUEVNWTVDZVdsa3pMYVNXUkRadnJMM056anR1UitMTUx6dm1GaE5odm1LVW1TNmc9S0/eC9INDdVYUY2SmMxeGx1anNQeGVGMzRqc1JrbFdqc2xWb0FycEZsRzFOSnc4Uy90N2Zpc0JpL2RjZGRlS1N0V1drKzIrWDU2T09KSERBZS9QeTA4RXVXWXYyVGpmbENZS0)
|
---
**[**TAKE ACTION**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/k_ypTVbmjjt7/V1hWZTRTNk9qaUI4bmRQNUlPU0REMmZkSkFqMjBJZXphUlZZU21LRzRUNHIyekVFUzVPQVM1dUJEbDhPUEVNWTVDZVdsa3pMYVNXUkRadnJMM056anR1UitMTUx6dm1GaE5odm1LVW1TNmc9S0/eC9INDdVYUY2SmMxeGx1anNQeGVGMzRqc1JrbFdqc2xWb0FycEZsRzFOSnc4Uy90N2Zpc0JpL2RjZGRlS1N0V1drKzIrWDU2T09KSERBZS9QeTA4RXVXWXYyVGpmbENZS0)**

** **
|
Peter --

Oil and gas companies are huge emitters of dangerous methane pollution and other harmful pollutants that are supercharging the climate crisis and jeopardizing the health of our families and our planet. And since oil and gas development is often located near low-wealth communities and communities of color, these communities face higher risks of cancer, asthma, and birth defects.

**We must do more to protect frontline communities and our climate from methane pollution.**

President Biden and the EPA have proposed a new rule that would crack down on the oil and gas industry's methane pollution and we need them to quickly finalize the strongest safeguards to protect public health. Oil and gas companies are already pushing back hard, so we need to show President Biden we have his back. [Add your name and help us deliver 35,000 messages of support for strong methane protections today >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/-LXrB9WqXXSZ/V1hWZTRTNk9qaUI4bmRQNUlPU0REMmZkSkFqMjBJZXphUlZZU21LRzRUNHIyekVFUzVPQVM1dUJEbDhPUEVNWTVDZVdsa3pMYVNXUkRadnJMM056anR1UitMTUx6dm1GaE5odm1LVW1TNmc9S0/eC9INDdVYUY2SmMxeGx1anNQeGVGMzRqc1JrbFdqc2xWb0FycEZsRzFOSnc4Uy90N2Zpc0JpL2RjZGRlS1N0V1drKzIrWDU2T09KSERBZS9QeTA4RXVXWXYyVGpmbENZS0)
|
---
**[**TAKE ACTION TO
FIGHT METHANE POLLUTION**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/_4bqMreDaaC~/V1hWZTRTNk9qaUI4bmRQNUlPU0REMmZkSkFqMjBJZXphUlZZU21LRzRUNHIyekVFUzVPQVM1dUJEbDhPUEVNWTVDZVdsa3pMYVNXUkRadnJMM056anR1UitMTUx6dm1GaE5odm1LVW1TNmc9S0/eC9INDdVYUY2SmMxeGx1anNQeGVGMzRqc1JrbFdqc2xWb0FycEZsRzFOSnc4Uy90N2Zpc0JpL2RjZGRlS1N0V1drKzIrWDU2T09KSERBZS9QeTA4RXVXWXYyVGpmbENZS0)**

From more intense storms to devastating droughts to sea level rise, the impacts of the climate crisis are here **now,** and we must act quickly to stop the pollution that is contributing to the crisis. Cutting methane pollution from the oil and gas industry is key to slowing the rate of climate change happening now. It's time to put what's best for the health of our families ahead of profits for the oil and gas companies.

Every day that passes without strong federal methane safeguards is a missed opportunity to reduce climate and air pollution and protect the health of current and future communities across this country. **We cannot continue to wait. The EPA must quickly finalize the strongest protections now.**

[We need to show the Biden administration that the environmental movement has his back in fighting for climate action and healthy communities. Please add your name today and help us reach our goal >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/2zZrMp-_33tA/V1hWZTRTNk9qaUI4bmRQNUlPU0REMmZkSkFqMjBJZXphUlZZU21LRzRUNHIyekVFUzVPQVM1dUJEbDhPUEVNWTVDZVdsa3pMYVNXUkRadnJMM056anR1UitMTUx6dm1GaE5odm1LVW1TNmc9S0/eC9INDdVYUY2SmMxeGx1anNQeGVGMzRqc1JrbFdqc2xWb0FycEZsRzFOSnc4Uy90N2Zpc0JpL2RjZGRlS1N0V1drKzIrWDU2T09KSERBZS9QeTA4RXVXWXYyVGpmbENZS0)

Together, we can win a cleaner climate and healthier communities for ourselves and future generations. Thank you for standing with us.

Onward,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters

---

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Ban Assault Weapons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
In 2022 alone, more than 160 people have been killed by an assault weapon.
#
**Peter, we need to Ban Assault Weapons in America.**
[**If you agree, will you sign on to our petition now? »**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/assault-weapons-bans-122022/?source=em20221222-1981&t=1&akid=1981%2E420207%2EiURseQ) **[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/assault-weapons-bans-122022/?source=em20221222-1981&t=2&akid=1981%2E420207%2EiURseQ)**
---
Peter,
We must end the senseless epidemic of gun violence in our country. In 2022 alone, more than 160 people have been killed by an assault weapon and more than 245 have been injured.
That’s why earlier this year, the House passed a bill to ban assault weapons — the first time a bill like this has passed since 1994.
It’s a huge step forward, but we need the Senate to pass this bill before the GOP takes control of the House in January. Are you with Pramila on this, Peter?
[**Add your name right now to build support for banning assault weapons. We must show our elected officials, across the political spectrum, that there’s overwhelming support for this gun safety law.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/assault-weapons-bans-122022/?source=em20221222-1981&t=3&akid=1981%2E420207%2EiURseQ)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/assault-weapons-bans-122022/?source=em20221222-1981&t=4&akid=1981%2E420207%2EiURseQ)**
Gun violence recently surpassed car accidents as the leading cause of death for American children. This is unacceptable — and a uniquely American problem.
There is no one single answer to ending gun violence in America, but one step in the right direction includes banning assault weapons. We’ve seen the evidence: When America had an assault weapons ban from 1994-2004, the result was a 37% decrease in gun massacres.
Peter, the GOP has no interest in getting rid of these horrific weapons. They depend on the NRA to fund their campaigns and have been bought and sold by the gun lobby. So we need to take action before Republicans take control of the House in January.
[**Will you sign on today in support of the Senate passing a ban on assault weapons? It’s a matter of life and death.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/assault-weapons-bans-122022/?source=em20221222-1981&t=5&akid=1981%2E420207%2EiURseQ)
Thank you for signing on today.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221222-1981-footer&t=6&refcode2=1981_420207_iURseQ&akid=1981%2E420207%2EiURseQ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: VIP THANK YOU: Happy Holidays!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56298348/384533850/152579071?emci=7baa769f-626b-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=16320219&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDI4MGUzOS0zMzgyLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E-IXSqNHZNe13SF1vwr8fYBnkCkuwjth3GvfxmzUCPY=) Dear Friend, As we observe the holidays in our own faith traditions, let us pray for a world at peace. Let it begin with us in our hearts and in America. While families come together to celebrate, may joy and comfort be with you. I am writing with a grateful heart to thank you. Working together this past election, our House Democrats made our own environment with the help of our VIPs – YOU, our Volunteers in Politics; our Very Important People. You are the guardians of Democracy. Because you believed that we could win, Democrats pushed back the anti-democratic tide of extremism, won the Senate and maintained a strong position in the House. My House Democratic colleagues put People Over Politics to deliver historic progress for the American people. With the courage of our values, Democrats faced off against Pharma, against the fossil fuel industry, and against the gun lobby – and we won. With gratitude for your trust, your friendship and your support for courageous House Democrats, for our shared progressive values and for me – thank you from the bottom of my heart. Together, we made history and together we will continue to make progress – For The People. God bless our veterans and God bless America. From my family to yours, Happy Holidays! | | **[**Follow me on Twitter!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56298349/384533851/152579071?emci=7baa769f-626b-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=16320219&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDI4MGUzOS0zMzgyLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E-IXSqNHZNe13SF1vwr8fYBnkCkuwjth3GvfxmzUCPY=)**
---
Thank you,
NANCY

Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.
As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.
We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.

clean_body: | | = Dear Friend, As we observe the holidays in our own faith traditions, let us pray for a world at peace. Let it begin with us in our hearts and in America. While families come together to celebrate, may joy and comfort be with you. I am writing with a grateful heart to thank you. Working together this past election, our House Democrats made our own environment with the help of our VIPs – YOU, our Volunteers in Politics; our Very Important People. You are the guardians of Democracy. Because you believed that we could win, Democrats pushed back the anti-democratic tide of extremism, won the Senate and maintained a strong position in the House. My House Democratic colleagues put People Over Politics to deliver historic progress for the American people. With the courage of our values, Democrats faced off against Pharma, against the fossil fuel industry, and against the gun lobby – and we won. With gratitude for your trust, your friendship and your support for courageous House Democrats, for our shared progressive values and for me – thank you from the bottom of my heart. Together, we made history and together we will continue to make progress – For The People. God bless our veterans and God bless America. From my family to yours, Happy Holidays! | | = Thank you, NANCY Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives. As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy. We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important. Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support? = Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. We'd hate to see you leave our movement completely, but if you must, please click . body:
We accomplished so much this year

| **From my family to yours, Happy Holidays!** We have so much to be grateful for this year.

Together we helped Southwest Ohio gain a real voice in Congress that will always look out for them, not for corporate interests.

**I am so grateful for the gift of your support this year, and look forward to the progress we’ll make together next year as the new Congress begins.**

So as we all pause and enjoy time with friends and family, I am wishing you and yours light and joy.

Thank you,

Greg Landsman

subject: ICYMI: Welcome to West Virginia.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM MORRISEY
body:
Where woke policies and government overreach go to die. | | |
---
[](http://links.teammorrisey.com/u/click?_t=b0356ef447a34444a1b227ba5b6fa8b2&_m=6a8b46b3e28c4ed9bc9a4be0d3ff75a5&_e=IFM9YibMS5ASwvJrSecJzbCo1KpWaz7sgjAHnBs95tofABS8VwOlFvzQWzRtKnjf4WvC7p8ot2PzEJr-rKcA2DcBVawrQll8ArCIObdgojsxgPtosOQ_PZlJVPiy2VyY2uO1li0nah80eZY91l211jfOu6ZCd7L1nLX1DejS4RrdUWFAMkSwWh1e2Hsly9QAhmTBh-O0Ia4yqOwTKa-FJ8ttIPpcf760UtpSlsQ63bcGGtj48RprCPnry0XUZNZgPglQYFqbo43yiNV1EhecDIDR1lFIxXdZhUwjFGxNL7gmO0Zg6lBKSanKxgQ4HQCYphdDaQ9IsYhiK-861B7v6cbnyLaAdjsDqWPyx_ST2m0LGdevWWdw2H3hRWju9Yy-B781AE7-f2DSIYFrWUGG-g%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,
---
Government has been allowed to grow too big for too long.
Worse yet, it is run by bureaucrats who don't have any accountability and make decisions while tossing the rule of law out the window.

Laws and the Constitution don’t need to be cast aside, wokeism does.
---
| | [**FIGHT THE WOKE MOB**](http://links.teammorrisey.com/u/click?_t=b0356ef447a34444a1b227ba5b6fa8b2&_m=6a8b46b3e28c4ed9bc9a4be0d3ff75a5&_e=IFM9YibMS5ASwvJrSecJzbCo1KpWaz7sgjAHnBs95tofABS8VwOlFvzQWzRtKnjf4WvC7p8ot2PzEJr-rKcA2DcBVawrQll8ArCIObdgojsxgPtosOQ_PZlJVPiy2VyY2uO1li0nah80eZY91l211jfOu6ZCd7L1nLX1DejS4RrdUWFAMkSwWh1e2Hsly9QAhmTBh-O0Ia4yqOwTKa-FJ8ttIPpcf760UtpSlsQ63bcGGtj48RprCPnry0XUZNZgAiEpGrbXHri1MSu1va2m96dU5lMzYTIbleOaDxcrsi2VioKb7vuxPtLEBgqvguOmextnhqjWstKiCn7AHjA_dJXpjxYAW1d4na_Ft-Z60OxryqHW28lDS-TZYN-k39kwMYjNYhCooISUA0qAd6YZpg%3D%3D)
---
I’ve had enough of talking heads saying what should be done, pointing fingers and placing blame, all the while rolling over to every wish and command of the Radical Left.

Enough talking. We need real conservative fighters leading the charge to take our country back. And that is exactly what I am doing. As the Attorney General of West Virginia, the rule of law comes first. You see, my state is where the woke wishlist goes to die.

[_**To learn more about my fight to stand up to the administrative state, you can read the full article here. >>>**_](http://links.teammorrisey.com/u/click?_t=b0356ef447a34444a1b227ba5b6fa8b2&_m=6a8b46b3e28c4ed9bc9a4be0d3ff75a5&_e=IFM9YibMS5ASwvJrSecJzZfE2z4haRE_FS8KYwPQdvr55e6Vi2ZWZ-vkPyoSI4Hy0ehxoBpQZ5I4DsxAuf_P66NsKRZR0biTfaOkH0l238B3ysPCD2UdJhfDxml1xftqbw-sqg_Ge2O9FgcTbIX07O7ARr_gdQYXM9G6H6E5EXRdyP_9L4ixSX_GZWpQON0ap1JE2dsZImmMstszLnVf29glHD-h6tGgrU2r8nnnol2gp-C5J8fOpGgKTaY_vJXBwfCaLPG9lzQTNfX_FVLigyxSa6YKtw34KJlzQc5TFD9ccEmdOf_otNpq0tREnl-H)

|

## Hope you have a very Merry Christmas...
and a great New Year with your families. Hope everyone has a chance to take a break and spend some time with their loved ones this season.
|
---
## Stay up to date with “Beyond the Briefing”...
Through the holiday season, we will be only doing Monday episodes of “Beyond The Briefing,” keeping you up to date on the biggest 5 stories of the week. On Monday’s episode I talked about Elon stepping down at Twitter, an update on the race to lead the RNC, the spending bill, of course hypocrisy from the Left and media and more, check it out.
Beyond the Briefing will be back Jan 2, we will have a lot to catch up on, subscribe now so you get it first:
| [Subscribe here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=d5efa85853&e=f6564bbe3b)

[McCarthy takes a hard line against any senator who backs spending deal (the 4155 page $1.7 Trillion bill) ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=f9d5daefd3&e=f6564bbe3b)— via CNN [GOP’s looming Afghanistan probe worries Biden aides ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=044f77a460&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Washington Post [Harris blames Republicans for border crisis: ‘Unwillingness to engage in any meaningful reform’](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=919b8ea16b&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Fox NewsDespite controlling both chambers of Congress and White House the VP blames Republicans for the crisis at the border. [US Supreme Court’s Roberts temporarily blocks end to pandemic-era border restrictions](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=27da79f1aa&e=f6564bbe3b) — via ReutersHUGE. [Biden claims his uncle Frank won Purple Heart but story doesn’t add up ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=e430838e75&e=f6564bbe3b)— via NY Post [The National Archives wants to release hundreds of pages of emails about Hunter Biden and Burisma — and the White House won’t say whether it will let it happen](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=758ac6ee6d&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Business Insider [Eric Adams seeks $1B from Biden as NYC migrants crush swells to 30K](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=1bb201c0eb&e=f6564bbe3b) — via NY Post You bill yourself as a sanctuary city but you send the real bill to the federal government. [Jim Jordan previews House Republicans approach to Big Tech, demanding info on alleged ‘collusion’ with Biden administration ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=4c3179d8c3&e=f6564bbe3b)— via CNBC[SCOOP: Washington Post executive editor Sally Buzbee has begun musing aloud to staff about whether she should resign](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=ef1b1cff23&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Semafor

clean_body: I need YOUR input | | | | | | | Untitled Document Friend, This is your formal notice. It’s almost the end of the year, so it’s time for my team to gather CRITICAL information from my Top 47 Patriots as we head into 2023. The radical Left has thrown a lot of challenges our way this year, especially ever since I announced my 2024 Presidential Campaign. Friend, I’m requesting ALL HANDS ON DECK. We must increase our defense efforts against Joe Biden and the Democrats in 2023. To get a head start into the new year, I must know where YOU stand on some pivotal issues. I just launched the Official Trump End-of-Year Canvass , and I need YOU to fill it out IMMEDIATELY. I trust no other Patriot’s judgment and discernment as much as YOURS, so I’m eager to review your response. Your answers are the KEY to stopping the Democrats from destroying our Nation in 2023, so I need YOU to hurry. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA PROUD AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GLORIOUS AGAIN. AND WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! But this is only possible if you update your Official Trump End-of-Year Canvass records IMMEDIATELY. Thank you, Donald J. name: 2A Task Force
subject: Don't comply this Holiday Season!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 2nd Amendment Task Force [2ataskforce
body:
| |
---
|
---
| | Friend, **Our God, our Families, our Guns, and our Freedoms! ** Don’t comply this Holiday season! 2A Task Force is not built on complying, it is built on defending our constitutional rights. Unlike the Biden administration and the radical left, our goal isn’t to overreach into your wallets this holiday season but for you to consider contributing to a mission that matters. 2A Task Force ensures that we can keep the ones we love safe from harm and protects us from tyrants using the power of government to take away our liberties. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Show everyone that you’re a part of our Squad
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, we have
some exciting news: We just released our limited-edition ‘Squad Up!’
sticker.

We’ll be sending a sticker to anyone who signs up to make a new monthly
recurring donation to support our work of ushering in a slate of diverse,
working-class leaders to Congress in 2024.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123865?refcode=em20221222-26695&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26695%2E1203867%2EVMClZa ]Make a recurring contribution and get our limited-edition sticker.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123865?refcode=em20221222-26695&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=26695%2E1203867%2EVMClZa ]Get Your Sticker »

Your sustaining donation will directly impact our ability to recruit
working-class, community leaders this next cycle. 2024 might sound like
it’s far away, but primary challenger campaigns need to start early in
order to scale and win and reach the voters who will deliver victory.

Whether you stick it on your laptop, car, notebook or anywhere else, you
can show off that you’re a part of our Squad and a dedicated part of our
progressive movement to change the status quo.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123865?refcode=em20221222-26695&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=26695%2E1203867%2EVMClZa ]Make a monthly donation to help us reach our goal of reaching 300 new
monthly contributions and we’ll send you this brand new sticker.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123865?refcode=em20221222-26695&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=26695%2E1203867%2EVMClZa ]Contribute Monthly »

Thank you for being a part of our movement,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1005&akid=26695%2E1203867%2EVMClZa ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1006&akid=26695%2E1203867%2EVMClZa ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221222-26695-footer&t=1007&refcode2=26695_1203867_VMClZa&akid=26695%2E1203867%2EVMClZa

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1008&akid=26695%2E1203867%2EVMClZa

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

It’s easy to get caught up in presents and Christmas cookies, but we can’t forget the real meaning of Christmas: celebrating the birth of Jesus Christ.

We’re so grateful to live in a country where we can freely worship and practice our faith.

name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: Our work isn't done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
I'll continue to push for Congress to re-establish the child tax credit in the new year.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56300653/384544862/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_221222CTC_N_JW_FULL_9_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGQ3ZTU3Yi00NzgyLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FWaCYkfRdvWIp2xcRYWlTJAEBmkkUQBPUl84fSyRr24=)
---
Friend,

Congress is wrapping up its work for the year — including making sure the government remains funded.

Unfortunately, we're going to fall short when it comes to something that matters for millions of working families: **renewing the child tax credit.**

I was not alone among my colleagues in urging Congress to act. But special interests won out, and now members will be going home for the holidays while many of their constituents continue to struggle.

**My pledge for the new year is to keep fighting for the child tax credit — and I need the help of my supporters to keep the call to action alive.** [**Will you stand with me and add your name to my petition? We're hoping for 10,000 signatures before the new Congress is sworn in on January 3.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56300654/384544863/-1586890226?ms=EM_PET_221222CTC_N_JW_FULL_9_NG_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_221222CTC_N_JW_FULL_9_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGQ3ZTU3Yi00NzgyLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FWaCYkfRdvWIp2xcRYWlTJAEBmkkUQBPUl84fSyRr24=&emci=e23a140b-ad81-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=70d7e57b-4782-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=32654120) [Add Your Name ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56300655/384544864/-1586890226?ms=EM_PET_221222CTC_N_JW_FULL_9_NG_N_B1&refcode=EM_PET_221222CTC_N_JW_FULL_9_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGQ3ZTU3Yi00NzgyLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FWaCYkfRdvWIp2xcRYWlTJAEBmkkUQBPUl84fSyRr24=&emci=e23a140b-ad81-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=70d7e57b-4782-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=32654120) Coming into 2021, our country was still in the grip of a devastating pandemic and its accompanying economic fallout. Millions were struggling every day to get by. When Congress provided relief through the American Rescue Plan, expanding the child tax credit was an essential component.

This expansion had historic results. Throughout 2021, childhood poverty fell by _26 percent._ **We could have helped tens of millions of more families in 2022 and beyond had we made the expansion permanent, and it speaks sad volumes that special interests can still limit our ability to pass life-changing policies.**

This is about fairness, opportunity, and humanity. Far too many parents still face the impossible choice between caring for their children and working to support their family. That should not happen in the United States.

I promise to keep speaking out about this, however long it takes. We have a chance at ending childhood poverty this decade if we can muster the political will to make the child tax credit permanent.

So as we prepare to ring in 2023, our work continues. [**Please join me and sign your name to urge Congress to re-expand the child tax credit and make it permanent →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56300656/384544865/-1586890226?ms=EM_PET_221222CTC_N_JW_FULL_9_NG_N_L2&refcode=EM_PET_220720SSM_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGQ3ZTU3Yi00NzgyLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FWaCYkfRdvWIp2xcRYWlTJAEBmkkUQBPUl84fSyRr24=&emci=e23a140b-ad81-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=70d7e57b-4782-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=32654120)

Thank you,

Jennifer | **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56300657/384544866/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_221222CTC_N_JW_FULL_9_NG_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGQ3ZTU3Yi00NzgyLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FWaCYkfRdvWIp2xcRYWlTJAEBmkkUQBPUl84fSyRr24=)****

This is about fairness, opportunity, and humanity. Far too many parents still face the impossible choice between caring for their children and working to support their family. That should not happen in the United States. I promise to keep speaking out about this, however long it takes. We have a chance at ending childhood poverty this decade if we can muster the political will to make the child tax credit permanent. So as we prepare to ring in 2023, our work continues. Thank you, Jennifer | Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America. **=** Paid for by Wexton for Congress Wexton for Congress PO Box 650550 Sterling, VA 20165 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .
