subject: ALERT: This Week's Trending News Stories *HOLIDAY WEEKEND EDITION*
body:
It's been a week of breaking news as Illinois Review continues to obtain documents and audio from inside the IL GOP.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/5106e86adf07/alert-this-weeks-trending-news-stories-holiday-weekend-edition?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=29840c22bd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_22_08_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-29840c22bd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

HOLIDAY WEEKEND EDITION

EXCLUSIVE AUDIO: DON TRACY ADMITS IRVIN CAMPAIGN USED IL GOP POSTAGE DISCOUNT DURING PRIMARY (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/exclusive-audio-don-tracy-admits-irvin-campaign-used-il-gop-postage-discount-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=29840c22bd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_22_08_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-29840c22bd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In exclusive audio recently obtained by Illinois Review, IL GOP chairman Don Tracy, during a meeting with conservative leaders in July, admits that the Irvin campaign for governor was allowed to use the IL GOP postage discount for mailers – a perk not afforded to other gubernatorial candidates in the primary race.

Using the IL GOP postage discount can save a statewide campaign tens of thousands of dollars on mailers – an expensive, but necessary evil in politics.

Tracy acknowledges use of the postage discount in the recording, but says the IL GOP was taking its “direction from the House Caucus and the Senate Caucus.”
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/exclusive-audio-don-tracy-admits-irvin-campaign-used-il-gop-postage-discount-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=29840c22bd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_22_08_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-29840c22bd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/exclusive-audio-don-tracy-admits-irvin-campaign-used-il-gop-postage-discount-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=29840c22bd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_22_08_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-29840c22bd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Don Tracy Appoints Nimish Jani, Who Rigged Lake County Straw Poll for Irvin, to IL GOP Executive Committee (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/don-tracy-appoints-nimish-jani-who-rigged-lake-county-straw-poll-for-irvin-to-il-gop-executive-committee.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=29840c22bd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_22_08_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-29840c22bd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Illinois Review has recently learned that IL GOP Chair Don Tracy personally appointed former state central committee member Nimish Jani, who endorsed Irvin for governor, to the IL GOP Executive Committee.

In June, it was revealed that Jani was the one responsible for bussing Indian-American senior citizens to the Lake County Republican straw poll to rig the poll in favor of his candidate Richard Irvin. The senior citizens, escorted by staff wearing Irvin-Bourne tee shirts, arrived at the meeting with pre-filled ballots.

Irvin would win the straw poll with 144 votes. The grassroots conservative candidate Darren Bailey would come in second place with 76 votes.

In a document shared exclusively with Illinois Review – in addition to existing state central committee members, Tracy names a few other individuals to the IL GOP Executive Committee besides Jani.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/don-tracy-appoints-nimish-jani-who-rigged-lake-county-straw-poll-for-irvin-to-il-gop-executive-committee.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=29840c22bd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_22_08_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-29840c22bd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/don-tracy-appoints-nimish-jani-who-rigged-lake-county-straw-poll-for-irvin-to-il-gop-executive-committee.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=29840c22bd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_22_08_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-29840c22bd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

============================================================

** SECOND AMENDMENT UPDATE (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/category/second-amendment?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=29840c22bd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_22_08_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-29840c22bd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Illinois Review is excited to announce a new strategic partnership with the ** Illinois State Rifle Association (https://isra.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=29840c22bd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_22_08_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-29840c22bd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
(ISRA), where we will be re-publishing their original content. It’s important to continue to highlight all things related to the Second Amendment with the broader Illinois Review community.

** TRENDING NEWS STORIES (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/category/trending?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=29840c22bd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_22_08_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-29840c22bd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Don Tracy Donates to Democrat Endorsed by Sen. Durbin Just Months Before His
IL GOP Chair Election (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/don-tracy-donates-to-democrat-endorsed-by-sen-durbin-just-months-before-his-il-gop-chair-election.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=29840c22bd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_22_08_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-29840c22bd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

New revelations uncovered by Illinois Review show that on September 4, 2020 – just months before his election as chairman of the Republican Party of Illinois, Tracy made a personal donation to Citizens for Judge Emily Sutton – a Democrat running for Circuit Court Judge in the 9th Judicial Circuit.

Just prior to Tracy’s donation, Sutton received a boost from two influential Illinois Democrats – US Sen. Dick Durbin, D-IL and US Rep. Cheri Bustos, D-IL, who at the time, was chairwoman of the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee and a close ally of House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, D-CA.
** Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/don-tracy-donates-to-democrat-endorsed-by-sen-durbin-just-months-before-his-il-gop-chair-election.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=29840c22bd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_22_08_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-29840c22bd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/don-tracy-donates-to-democrat-endorsed-by-sen-durbin-just-months-before-his-il-gop-chair-election.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=29840c22bd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_22_08_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-29840c22bd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** According to Records, IL GOP Leaders Give
Very Little Money, or Not at All (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/according-to-records-il-gop-leaders-give-very-little-money-or-not-at-all.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=29840c22bd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_22_08_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-29840c22bd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Illinois Review reported that nearly half of the IL GOP state central committee members haven’t donated to the IL GOP, despite serving as senior party officials.

And while many of the state central committee members are upset with this public revelation, not one single person has offered to show any proof that they have in fact donated to the IL GOP.

And since the state central committee and senior IL GOP officials are obsessed with money, Illinois Review is taking a deeper dive into some of these donations – or a lack thereof.
** Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/according-to-records-il-gop-leaders-give-very-little-money-or-not-at-all.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=29840c22bd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_22_08_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-29840c22bd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/according-to-records-il-gop-leaders-give-very-little-money-or-not-at-all.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=29840c22bd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_22_08_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-29840c22bd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Kaspar: Illinois Grassroots' Hero Charlie Kirk Can Seal IL GOP Chairman Don Tracy's Fate (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/kaspar-illinois-grassroots-hero-charlie-kirk-can-seal-il-gop-don-tracys-fate.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=29840c22bd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_22_08_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-29840c22bd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

To win races again in Illinois, the IL GOP has no choice but to engage the grassroots. But by having burned that bridge to the ground at last Saturday’s State Central Committee and having no plan for addressing early and mail-in voting laws, IL GOP Chairman Don Tracy has proven that he is not the leader we need right now. As Turning Point USA Founder and Illinois native Charlie Kirk would have to agree, a leader not focused on grassroots organizing and messaging will never win. ** Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/kaspar-illinois-grassroots-hero-charlie-kirk-can-seal-il-gop-don-tracys-fate.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=29840c22bd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_22_08_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-29840c22bd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/kaspar-illinois-grassroots-hero-charlie-kirk-can-seal-il-gop-don-tracys-fate.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=29840c22bd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_22_08_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-29840c22bd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** SUBSCRIBE TODAY! (https://www.illinoisreview.com/switching-plans-wizard?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=29840c22bd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_22_08_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-29840c22bd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wNxdYINrxlg&t=183s&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=29840c22bd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_22_08_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-29840c22bd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
ICYMI: On Tuesday, our publisher Scott Kaspar joined ** WXAN 103.9 FM (https://streamdb8web.securenetsystems.net/v5/index.cfm?stationCallSign=WXAN&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=29840c22bd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_22_08_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-29840c22bd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, the conservative voice of Southern Illinois, to discuss the latest on Illinois Review.

Peter, In 2018, Russian authorities arrested U.S. Marine Paul Whelan, wrongly accusing him of being a spy. They convicted him of espionage and sentenced him to 16 years in prison. _Things took a turn for the worse recently..._ The Biden Administration had the opportunity to secure Whelan’s release in December. Instead, the White House agreed to release a violent Russian arms dealer in exchange for WNBA player Brittney Griner, who was convicted of possessing marijuana in Russia.

Many Americans are upset over this, and rightfully so. But what’s even more alarming is that something similar has been happening here in America._ _ **Innocent Warriors are wrongly accused of crimes while serving in the United States Armed Forces – and they’re paying the price.****** [**SUPPORT OUR HEROES >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5f9a971df9d64a8196b75886ab7ad1fa&_e=Iyux97wUR90g0Ke1rg8SbvGfEZ8WyoAw9M2H8lh99RP6bbjD-n6dBzeWKccEti87FkBP8j05e43mJxf61onGBYtmfAYVIBu1E2JlO819t6osQsYp9SNAAGVhRndQ8FC_j9GgDFN-XWQ8k8HyCiFk0NBQJRi3b7a8opj9ANjWrNC7y2AuBUaBnuU-SXwBDkQH0q_IfD1meQymHYgdWx9-A1_iM5u-BJWv8ZxoHw3WNEaYJFOISOI9pO0ASUip5pveZfp-yeMXv3SxY6vq-EvU-Ue9wyPP0Sm7FPrXGDy9uiYCT6dldy1hphUubISUeukEynHTM4GIDA-OoR1RArCo8RY0bDnV1PjxMid4tfJi4FuIWtxkLXHnPlItzIicDyOACHaUSCCjCV0mYcCRsR8FkjapiX-5OXZj4hWTlmH8Q8v8R0jc47zskv4wOhiWzdRTkSU7YyNzUcnQYaH8c9GTJ7c7oD7Wul1_7sFyOBu6YN0%3D) When these Heroes joined the Military, they wrote a blank check. For you. For me. For our freedom. They did this just to be ripped away from their families and forced to endure long, sham trials and intense media scrutiny. **Some even face the possibility of LIFE in prison for a crime they did not commit.** This has to stop. We are asking concerned Patriots like you to join us in demanding our government and political leaders do everything they can to get Paul Whelan released and bring ALL our heroes home NOW! [**Help us fight for the Warriors that have done so much for our nation. They’re counting on us.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5f9a971df9d64a8196b75886ab7ad1fa&_e=Iyux97wUR90g0Ke1rg8SbvGfEZ8WyoAw9M2H8lh99RP6bbjD-n6dBzeWKccEti87FkBP8j05e43mJxf61onGBYtmfAYVIBu1E2JlO819t6osQsYp9SNAAGVhRndQ8FC_j9GgDFN-XWQ8k8HyCiFk0NBQJRi3b7a8opj9ANjWrNC7y2AuBUaBnuU-SXwBDkQH0q_IfD1meQymHYgdWx9-A1_iM5u-BJWv8ZxoHw3WNEaYJFOISOI9pO0ASUip5pveZfp-yeMXv3SxY6vq-EvU-Ue9wyPP0Sm7FPrXGDy9uiYCT6dldy1hphUubISUeukEynHTM4GIDA-OoR1RArCo8S2VH2E7DV9-BiMSflLJpnFhEzex4WLq1XovZItLOpWMtC5S5Ylh8RotkYpvZyJjo9nqJvWig7cJmAdZcgzvfs_5hcPFJOx2KyZh8THxf2ttNaF5nkH4FFNEMQ23cUl6dSfbSGfY8bAjA0CEm5F2xBU%3D)

Innocent Warriors are wrongly accused of crimes while serving in the United States Armed Forces – and they’re paying the price.** When these Heroes joined the Military, they wrote a blank check. For you. For me. For our freedom. They did this just to be ripped away from their families and forced to endure long, sham trials and intense media scrutiny. Some even face the possibility of LIFE in prison for a crime they did not commit. This has to stop. We are asking concerned Patriots like you to join us in demanding our government and political leaders do everything they can to get Paul Whelan released and bring ALL our heroes home NOW! Thank you, David “Bull” GurfeinLt. Col., USMCR (Ret.)CEO, United American Patriots | | | | | ---|--- UAP, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. Donations are tax deductible. United American Patriots 1800 Diagonal Road, Suite 600, Alexandria, VA 22314 571-366-1835 ** | | | | | | Paid for by United American Patriots | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Josh Riley
subject: A Holiday Message From Josh
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress
body:
There's so much that I'm thankful for this holiday season, and I'm sending this note to let you know that I'm especially thankful for YOU.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56301583/384547897/-1126184350?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDYwNWY3ZC00ZDgyLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u1glagjyfROkyhTGOs1g1zKEVO_e2pwvv4jICOXshxc=&emci=ab088b05-3182-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=9d605f7d-4d82-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=4588596)
---
| HiPeter,

There's so much that I'm thankful for this holiday season, and I'm sending this note to let you know that I'm especially thankful for **_YOU_**. Although we came up just two points short in our campaign for Congress, I'm really proud of what we accomplished together:

✅ We had more volunteer shifts than any Democratic challenger campaign in the country during GOTV weekend, and we turned out a higher percentage of Democrats than any Democratic congressional campaign in New York.

✅ We raised more money than any Democratic House candidate in New York after the August 23 election--and we did it with 90% of our contributions at $100 or less and not a single penny from corporate PACs.

✅ We met thousands of voters at hundreds of events across twenty counties from the Finger Lakes to the Hudson Valley, from the Southern Tier to the Mohawk Valley, and everywhere in between.

✅ We offered a bold and optimistic message focused on strengthening the Middle Class and protecting our Democracy--and we did it even in the face of over $6 million in shamefully deceitful Super PAC ads against us.

While I'm (very!) disappointed that we lost, I'm not discouraged from public service--and I hope you're not either. There's just too much work to be done, especially here in New York, which is the path to taking back the House majority in 2024.

But first... let's rest, recover, and enjoy the holidays with loved ones. As you do, please know that I am forever grateful for your support.

From my family to yours: HAPPY HOLIDAYS.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56301584/384547898/-1126184350?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDYwNWY3ZC00ZDgyLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u1glagjyfROkyhTGOs1g1zKEVO_e2pwvv4jICOXshxc=&emci=ab088b05-3182-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=9d605f7d-4d82-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=4588596)
With gratitude & high hopes,

~Josh

* * *
| |

body:
Make this Christmas special

| Hello there friends,

Christmas is approaching, and I want to make it a special day for Chuck. He is on Santa's nice list, and to reward him for all he's done for Iowa and America this year, I want to surprise him.
_**[Are you in the giving spirit?](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=aad880dce702480e8ee454d9f8f378fc&_e=AYijNd2_NwSHwwjGm4H8XSZGaMIKGcrr2zNHxl01_26ey5pelNmC2h_nO1KuwhG6SseUmEQrzhsHGiiw3sAZeNnkw8zDTKpzROeemO126qrQ1Th5vMgxApxBPpynQvhAeCwLilMtiYBxBkCDVzdGfaBVd-PSX9m6-tD1rb5KphnjIHh92-uCYo-ROo58430BPQFCanyGKjgcQ1hgoBicrN-tk_84MjfH30S6dCqoAc8xZ0H5WjHgELCkeHWvGCXHt2ZsywtN56qhVTnqVnLg8xWxVN2yzHZ6wgQE38I-FBKhksDsSr6_Vq53pwFl69szWsHDrH0_FtlUlQ1TaJxjpcBiNlURBuWDccbN1AHeLj376fl3V21AJNTxfgM_V3kxFLV7L-7gS5iDtFO8gdN8nOmsda8jZ1jXdndIcCKcjUKkALVkRaD6SgUt8BtIqGI648z2rd8-hZeVNLcOBBuZZc4by5QDNIYR4C-9EyroUu3GETtUJ-2EamKmcWDd-uls)**_

**[DONATE AND WISH CHUCK A MERRY CHRISTMAS](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=aad880dce702480e8ee454d9f8f378fc&_e=AYijNd2_NwSHwwjGm4H8XSZGaMIKGcrr2zNHxl01_26ey5pelNmC2h_nO1KuwhG6SseUmEQrzhsHGiiw3sAZeNnkw8zDTKpzROeemO126qrQ1Th5vMgxApxBPpynQvhAeCwLilMtiYBxBkCDVzdGfaBVd-PSX9m6-tD1rb5KphnjIHh92-uCYo-ROo58430BPQFCanyGKjgcQ1hgoBicrN-tk_84MjfH30S6dCqoAc8xZ0H5WjHgELCkeHWvGCXHt2ZsywtN56qhVTnqVnLg8xWxVN2yzHZ6wgQE38I-FBKhksDsSr6_Vq53pwFl69szWsHDrH0_FtlUlQ1TaJxjpcBiNlURBuWDccbN1AHeLj3gOgmxKiBw1Wij-BMrMX7MU0HUIQLLCdimynP4nT6rUnecxG0gdXRXmiN55edg54NHJSRhvcGOOQ3WUUtl4t_g2Kx3_KbFl-qJgOSavdO_XU8ZBu1YClNC4KBs-Dw72JIn10SziNbI6rkwXvR0AfNP)**
[ ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=aad880dce702480e8ee454d9f8f378fc&_e=AYijNd2_NwSHwwjGm4H8XSZGaMIKGcrr2zNHxl01_26ey5pelNmC2h_nO1KuwhG6SseUmEQrzhsHGiiw3sAZeNnkw8zDTKpzROeemO126qrQ1Th5vMgxApxBPpynQvhAeCwLilMtiYBxBkCDVzdGfaBVd-PSX9m6-tD1rb5KphnjIHh92-uCYo-ROo58430BPQFCanyGKjgcQ1hgoBicrN-tk_84MjfH30S6dCqoAc8xZ0H5WjHgELCkeHWvGCXHt2ZsywtN56qhVTnqVnLg8xWxVN2yzHZ6wgQE38I-FBKhksDsSr6_Vq53pwFl69szWsHDrH0_FtlUlQ1TaJxjpa0XPZKdAzyjzLtAI5jr2_jBZAuFshHeVwLvqV0HGthSERLtaJV8_fF-brjajioXC8hkYXScqdNY1sYuhU0Mi0BhuMQBCJQ0U-TJ2A6KVqxF3Ii5JjghGV8S3la7AJIRuUmM-WfsbqFtzzA0MbgoVHkcXeNmavaZv0UctezEFRuS)
My husband relentlessly fights for working Americans every single day.

Throughout his time in the Senate, he has never been so worried for the future of our country. He wakes up for his morning run at 4 AM every day and works late into the night. He learned his work ethic from growing up on the farm and working on the factory floor. He has taken that same drive to the Senate floor to fight for the American people.

**He gives a voice to hardworking Americans and listens to Iowans. Every county. Every year.**

Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer sure could use more common sense. Luckily, Chuck has enough common sense for the both of them!

**[Donate now to support Chuck so he can keep working for YOU!](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=aad880dce702480e8ee454d9f8f378fc&_e=AYijNd2_NwSHwwjGm4H8XSZGaMIKGcrr2zNHxl01_26ey5pelNmC2h_nO1KuwhG6SseUmEQrzhsHGiiw3sAZeNnkw8zDTKpzROeemO126qrQ1Th5vMgxApxBPpynQvhAeCwLilMtiYBxBkCDVzdGfaBVd-PSX9m6-tD1rb5KphnjIHh92-uCYo-ROo58430BPQFCanyGKjgcQ1hgoBicrN-tk_84MjfH30S6dCqoAc8xZ0H5WjHgELCkeHWvGCXHt2ZsywtN56qhVTnqVnLg8xWxVN2yzHZ6wgQE38I-FBKhksDsSr6_Vq53pwFl69szWsHDrH0_FtlUlQ1TaJxjpcBiNlURBuWDccbN1AHeLj33CAyO6gjoxSfFTmCMAg7HbipEdFlwWTRPV4eJe4zSOW_MRJElT1kZsCJ5qu89DbXGpYzX105Aov0_C8muK8Rum71eUzZ1AoHfbRH7TybrHFJtagB4aUm5vWbicrUE7eMg9eqqkDEkCeBxC9HH1yB1)**

Merry Christmas,

Barbara Grassley
